reviews.text: I had a great experience with them! Michael Gross took care of my case and got it settled and I am now free from the stress and worry! Thank you a million times!!! Highly recommend!

Although I was a somewhat difficult client to deal with, luckily the facts supported our case.  HH&M was able to take a good case and convert it into a win... a unanimous verdict awarding ZERO dollars to the plaintiff who was suing me.

Mr. Harrison is a very experienced lawyer and appears to be rather knowledgeable about spinal injury.  He & his law firm were very self-motivated to do their homework on the case.

Unfortunately, as a defendant, you are kept in the dark about a lot of things, but HH&M found that all three individuals claiming injury maintained their normal activities (work, football, drill team & dance) and that they'd repeatedly failed to disclose previous car accidents and claimed injuries to the doctors who were treating them.  The evidence from the scene of the alleged injuries was already exceptionally compelling, but these facts uncovered by HH&M just made it that much more clear what was going on.
Very nice people.
Excellent professionals

This attorney shouldn’t be in practice. Unprepared, doesn’t respond to emails, phone calls and honestly has no clue how to navigate Dallas County to help good fathers. He brought his young daughter to listen to circumstances of the case and the only way I could set up a sit down was to offer him free breakfast next to his office. A disgrace to all good fathers screwed by a system that works together

As someone else mentioned in a review, Scott is a phenomenal attorney. From the start of my case till the end he was very assertive and attentive to the needs of the case but also to my needs for information. If you do what you’re suppose to and what he tells you to do you’ll come out on top. He was very professional and explained everything in great detail and looked and analyzed every avenue of approach to my case. I would definitely recommend Scott to represent you.

As a school teacher, it is hard to find a lawyer that not only cares deeply about his clients, but who also has a heart to defend women.  Mr. Ruggiero fought for me in a just and caring way.  Never left me alone and made sure that I was well taken care of during a very difficult time for me and my son.  I highly recommend his firm.

I am almost 20 now so I have been able to get in contact with my mom.  I asked her why she never tried to see me. She said she did,  she hired this lawyer who did nothing to help her. She said she was poor and just kept giving this guy money and he wouldn't do anything on her case. Not even call her back.  Then my mom got really sick with covid. After covid she became sicker, and wasn't able to hire another lawyer.  I am upset because of my dad keeping me from my mom. Him and his family caused some of her mental illness. They took me away from her when I was 5 years old.  I hated her for leaving me. They said so much bad stuff about my mom to me.  I may never get to see my mom again in real life.  All this guy had to do was his job while my mom was healthy enough to fight.  Now she had to move to get into an affordable hospice to care for her that is far away.  This guy doesn't care about families or helping you. He doesn't even care to just do his job.
Can never get ahold of him, doesn't call you back.  No updates on case and does nothing on your case just takes your money

Nope don't do it waste of money and got nothing.  BTW go look at the people who leave 4 star reviews,  they leave similar reviews on other attorneys.  Like verbatim Christian Bold how many lawyers do you need insane.  Scott is a scam and should be disbarred from practicing law. I suggest if you have been scammed like me and all the others in the comments go file a complaint with the Texas Bar Association.  I did!

Phenomenal attorney who will leave no stone unturned when looking for a resolution for any problem you throw at him. Extremely resourceful and knowledgeable.

Helped me on multiple issues including real estate, lease agreements, and others. I will continue to utilize Scott's services as I have always been satisfied.

Scott can help you in pinch. Was a very rough situation in life. Scott helped save me. Seriously you need an attorney that actually cares, understands, and believes in listening to you with empathy. Scott is your person. Thanks 🙏 Scott for all you did for my life.
Scott does great civil work. Would highly recommend his expertise. Very efficient and communicates well. Thanks Scott!

During my divorce, I feel bad for his secretly,  I’m sure she is tired of covering for him.  He told me my divorce would be done in 90 days.  I believe it took 3 years.   It got to the point I decided to text his secretary once a week.   Then I decided to text her everyday.   Then I finally put them in a group text and text every single day.  This pushed me to giving up and losing money  just to get it over with.   RUN.

I was a little skeptical at first with the minor lack of communication, but as soon as he entered the courtroom, everyone knew who the smartest person in the room was. Absolute MONSTER! I've got an attorney for life!

I've used Scott for 2 separate cases, 6 years apart. He is ALWAYS upfront about things, doesn't beat around the bush and that's what I appreciated the most. He works hard and long hours to get you and your family exactly what you're wanting. He puts his heart into his work and it's noticeable. Thank you, Scott!

I have been using Scott Ruggiero, PC for a variety of legal services for the last year.  Scott and his staff are extremely professional and a joy to deal with.  Not to mention, Scott is a knowledgeable attorney on a broad range of topics and straight forward in style - his council has become invaluable to me and our business.  He is now my attorney for everything!
Very thorough, and knowledgeable. Puts his clients interests first and foremost.  I wish I could elaborate... but definite high praise
If you want an attorney who is going to take your money, do nothing they promised you, and then ghost you- this is the place for you.  As far as I’m concerned Mr Ruggiero stole my money.

Interviewed several attorneys and each one I felt rushed. Each one has same script but Scott was different. I went for what I was expecting to be quick introduction and was prepared with all I needed to tell him as quick as possible but I had totally different experience.
Scott is a real person, real and upfront and did everything he said he would.
He didn’t play the dirty card in my custody case and presented the facts.
His wife was the bonus to it all! She was there in court and such an amazing support to my family !
Great attorney who cares about clients and knows how to get results.

I cannot recommend Simon | Paschal PLLC highly enough! I was fortunate to be connected with Paul Simon through Asad Rahman, a prominent attorney in our community, and from the very first interaction, I knew I was in excellent hands. The entire team at Simon | Paschal PLLC was professional, knowledgeable, and truly invested in my case. They took the time to listen to my concerns, explain every step of the process in detail, and always made sure I felt informed and supported.

What stood out the most was their dedication and responsiveness. Anytime I had a question or needed clarification, they were quick to respond with clear, thoughtful answers. Their attention to detail and strategic approach gave me complete confidence that my case was in the best hands possible.

Beyond their legal expertise, they showed genuine care and compassion, making a stressful situation much easier to navigate. They fought tirelessly on my behalf, and their hard work led to a better outcome than I ever expected. If you're looking for a law firm that is professional, ethical, and truly committed to their clients, look no further than Simon | Paschal PLLC. I am beyond grateful for their support and highly recommend them to anyone in need of legal representation!

Let me start by saying that Kathryn Haywood was a God-send to us. She was the miracle that we were praying for to help our son from a case that would have ended his entire future. Kathryn was sympathetic, listened to the facts, formulated the path forward, and acted swiftly. She was straight to the point, says it like it is, a no nonsense individual and her knowledge of the justice system is her strength. Her quick action spared us the anguish that would have tormented us through our  Christmas celebration. We probably wouldn’t have much to celebrate if the case was unresolved going into the holidays. She addressed the case soon after our video call which led to a speedy resolution, within a week from our video call! Incredible! We believe she made sure that she has good news for us before Christmas, which demonstrates her dedication to her profession and her compassionate nature. No words can express our deep gratitude for her help. It was the most significant Christmas gift that we've ever received which we’ll never forget.

My charges weren't too severe however, Ms. Haywood was always attentive to my needs as a client.  There was only one concern that I had, which was a delay in communication, but she made sure - while she was on vacation, mind you - exactly what to expect proceeding to my release date.  Also too, what I wasn't aware of is that she had a case completely dismissed!  That was well after I had been released.  Thank you Ms. Haywood.

**By the way, great handbag!** 🙂

I needed help setting up a will. Attorney Nathan and his team were highly recommended to me.  The process was smooth from the initial consult to signing documents. It is great to know we do not have to constantly update our documents.  Nathan and his manager Liz were always quick to respond anytime I had questions during the process. I had a wonderful experience working with Nathan Sukhia. I'd tried to reach several attorneys, leaving messages but getting no response. When I called Nathan, I was prepared to leave another message, but HE actually answered the phone. He listened to me describe the reason for my call and took immediate action to help resolve the problem. Nathan kept me updated on the progress of my case and successfully resolved it in my favor. If I find myself in need of an attorney again, I won't look for one. I will call the attorney who WILL answer the phone and WILL care about helping me.

reviews.text:
LISA.IS.THE.BEST!!!
It is so good to have her on your side. My case was one of the most complicated case involving international borders. I had hired another attorney before who messed it up for me. I requested Lisa to take my case on a very short notice. She was kind enough to take it. She dedicated herself to it and today the judgement was in my favor. I think we go through a very complicated and stressful period during our family law issues. The ability to make the best decisions often get compromised in such situations. We need a smart, intelligent and genuinely concerned attorney on our side during tough times. I can safely say that Ms Lisa Hernandez is the BEST FAMILY LAW ATTORNEY. She even took out the time to follow up on my case during her vacation. Thank you sooooo much every one there once again.

I reached out to this firm for will and trust services covered under my legal plan. The officer manager emailed to ask me for my member and case number.  I asked to speak to an attorney regarding the services they render and was told that without my member and case number, they can't schedule an initial discussion/consultation unless I pay a $150 flat fee. Needless to say I was turned off and did not sign up - this firm doesn't seem to understand what client or customer service entails.

Amazing and Beautiful law office in Frisco, building is new and law office is nearly palatial in appearance.  MacKoy seems to really know her stuff and I'm sure she is a fabulous no nonsense Attorney in the court room for her Clients. I fear that her services would have been beyond our price range and after the initial consultation she referred us to several other attorneys that would be better suited to handle our situation.  So she is definitely honest and not about needlessly wasting people's time if the show isn't a good fit.

I've used this law firm twice for issues concerning my ex being in contempt of a court order over child support issues and non payments.

The first time was with Deborah Mackoy and I was granted all back child support, unpaid medical expenses, court costs and attorney fees. Deborah was very efficient, professional and was pleased from start to finish with my results.

Four years have passed since I first hired this law firm. I started having issues again with my ex not abiding by our court order. I didn't hesitate to contact this law firm and was assigned attorney Christine Qualls. Christine was professional and performed exceptional in court. Once again we were granted all child support, uninsured medical expenses, court costs and attorney fee's.

I wouldn't hesitate to hire Christine Qualls again for any issues that arise .

Hired Hernandez for a divorce. She did a great "sales pitch" when I interviewed her. She openly admitted that opposing council was going to be aggressive and will "make it harder than it has to be". She knew what she was up against. Temporary Hearing. A train wreck. Opposing council was organized and executed his plan perfectly. Hernandez was unprepared and had no game plan. I had supplied her with documentation to counter opposing council. She never presented it. Following day I asked her why. She said she "could not do that to another woman". Well, she had no problem doing it to me. She also told my adult kids that "this divorce will probably wipe me out". I fired her. Hired a competent firm. Ultimately. I was back in my home in two months. Got sole custody of my daughter. Achieved a fair division of property. I want my money back.

reviews.text: Nick helped my wife and me with our wills and trusts, helped us setup an LLC and a few other family law legal matters.  We recently moved out of state and we have gone through a rough spot.  My S/O called Nick for advice on how to protect herself.  Even though he represented both of us and isn't supposed to give legal advice to one of us that could hurt the other my understanding, or what I am being told, is that he did advise, give her legal advice, which I believe is unethical.  I do not have 100% proof this happened.  I am going by what my S/O told me and I am also suspicious because I feel I was misled by Nick's paralegal and, it doesn't seem like Nick gave me the whole truth when I asked him directly, if what I am being told by my S/O is true.  I am in one of those situations where my trust in Nick, and his paralegal, is gone and I would never use him again.  I fully understand that I may not be 100% in the right here but I also do not think I am anywhere close to 100% wrong.

My ex-wife and I hired George for divorce mediation. My ex wasn't knowledgable about asset division with a divorce and had a lot of expectations that weren't really accurate. George was able to educate her, keep her calm, and keep her in mediation until she signed. I wasn't very confident she would sign after 10 months of separation. George did it. He's very patient, he listens, he has a very kind disposition that is perfect for mediation. This mediation lasted 7 hours and he was 100% with us the whole time. After mediation, paperwork has to be filed and signed. He and his staff were on top of all of it and were incredibly responsive to our questions. I had so much anxiety going into this process. George and his staff really took care of me and I can't recommend them enough.

2020 Update: Sue reached out to me at the end of 2020 to request that I connect with her on two different professional social media sites. Clearly she didn't really believe the negative comment (see below) she made long ago.

Prior reply: The client, "Sue," has not told the truth at all.  It is sad that such a good client has resorted to this emotional retaliation after I got her such a good result in court. This client hired me on an emergency basis, and asked me to handle a case set for a major hearing in less than two days, and which had been filed against her by her ex-husband seeking FULL custody of her only son, seeking to force the child to change schools, and seeking to strip the mother of her rights to make decisions about education. Other lawyers fired her as a client because she is difficult to deal with. The issues were complex, and she was told that it would require a large retainer because I had to set aside OTHER clients' cases and prepare solely for her court battle in less than a day and a half. I told her that my rate is very expensive, and she agreed, as she had waited until the last minute to hire me. Her prior lawyer did not get along with her and quit. I did not. Not only did we communicate, we did nothing but talk and work on her case the entire day before the hearing, which was the only day we had. She sent dozens of pages of documents to review, papers from the prior lawyer, case history, and we met for several hours to prepare, all the day before. We went to the courthouse for 4 hours the following day and the client KEPT custody, KEPT the child in the same school, KEPT all decision-making rights, and got everything she asked for. During the hearing, she completely broke down in the court hallway, crying and screaming in a rage because of what her ex claimed. I worked very hard to calm her down and did indeed say several times "I need you to listen to me and stop talking! I'm on YOUR side!" When it was over, she cried and hugged me and THANKED me for taking her case and "taking care of me and my son." She apologized for her outbursts and said "I'm really not a 'tiger-mom.'" A few days later she came to my office to bring me a GIFT from her and her son as a thank you. The case was not yet over, but after winning, she decided she wanted to counter-sue and take away some of the father's rights. Immediately after that, she lost a lease and was going to be forced to take her son to a different school, all unrelated to the case. However, it complicated her position, and while I was still dealing with the other issues in her case, she wanted to "ramp up" the fight against her ex. She demanded a second temporary hearing and asked for a restraining order against him. Since she and I had such success in court, she wanted to punish her ex-husband and expand the fight. I told her that her funds were depleted as I had already spent over 15 hours on her emergency case, and she got angry. She stated "I thought we could do it all for the initial retainer," despite having been told several times that was not the case. I explained a huge war with the other side will be expensive. She angrily said that was "fine" and that she would sign an order allowing my withdrawal. When we tried to reach her to get her signature, she refused all of our calls, which required me to go back to court at my own time and expense. She waited until THE DAY OF the withdrawal hearing to then attack me on this site in retaliation, and despite having profusely thanked me for all that I did for her and her son. Her review was written solely out of spite and anger. I spent more than 15 hours between July 9, 2014 and October 6, 2014, and got her everything she asked for, and defeated ALL of her ex-husband's claims. It is notable that she has had appr. 10 lawyers before me. This anger and disagreeableness is a pattern with this client. If you want to hire an attorney selected to the top 100 in North Texas, it will be expensive, but you will get great results. But, some clients will never be satisfied. I wish her the best.

She started the phone call with high energy and the interesting part is that she didn't ask about the sutituion or what I was looking for. She went straight to "do you plan to retain the attorney". Megan was informative, diligence, transparent, and kept me up to date on the process." provided me with the utmost professional service. She listened to my concerns and implemented the steps.. I am extremely grateful for the Wright Firm. I got the Wright Firm to represent me. In the first week, the Wright team turned things around, and we finally got the momentum we needed in my case. The paralegal was rude and presented herself as not wanting to help with my case without even knowing all the full details. The Attorney called me regarding my review. He was sincere and wanted to fix it.
reviews.ownerResponse:
Ms. Schlegel,
We would like to express our sincere apologies for the unpleasant experience you had with our paralegal. We strive to provide exceptional service to all our clients, and it is disheartening to hear that we fell short of your expectations.

We take your feedback seriously, and upon learning about your review, our attorney promptly reached out to you to address the situation. We are glad to hear that their conversation was sincere and that they expressed a genuine desire to rectify the matter.

We believe in treating every client with respect and attentiveness, regardless of the information available at the time. Our paralegal's behavior does not align with our values, and we will be taking immediate action to ensure that this kind of situation does not occur again in the future.

We would appreciate the opportunity to discuss your case further and work towards a resolution that meets your needs. Please feel free to reach out to our office at your earliest convenience, and we will be more than happy to assist you. Our Managing Partner, Patrick A. Wright, would love to discuss your experience. He may be reached at 214-763-8343.

Thank you for bringing this matter to our attention, and we appreciate your willingness to give us another chance to make it right. We are committed to providing you with the professional and supportive legal assistance you deserve.

reviews.text:
Updated review: I will start by saying my experience did not go well.  However, Mr. Wright reached out to us and asked to have a conversation. He solicited feedback on where we felt things fell short, what they could do, and what he could do as the managing partner. He apologized and left us with the impression that our feedback will be shared to improve future client interactions.

Not every transaction can go perfect, but how a business owner handles those imperfect events speaks volumes.  And in this case, Mr. Wright did "Wright" by us.

His clients are his family and he is going to fight for you like you would your own children! If you want a fighting and someone who won’t back down and will never stop choose him! He put me on the right track and straightened everything out! I had been fighting for two years and he killed it in a day! He should really be a judge because he puts the judges on the edge of a cliff with his knowledge of the law! He’s knowledge will put pressure on you like never before! From beginning to end he has kept me on my toes and treated me and my children as priority and family! I don’t know when he sleeps but I know he loves his career & a mean fight! He will always win! It’s not often that you mean someone that has the licenses he has and pots he has his hands in! In court everyone was always hey Patrick this Patrick that & he’s always professional, fair & fights hard! No one could ever find a better lawyer! Idc what anyone says this guy knows his stuff and was recommended by many judges! He’s a hard guy to beat so if your coming for him you better swing hard like your life depends on it! I will never be able to say or thank him and Shannon enough they’re more than heroes with a great conscious! He’s simply just a great person, great lawyer and family man! God chose him for the position and he exceeds Everytime!

*****An God Sent Angel Uplifted Me From Darkest Times Of My Life*****

I am Kumar from India and an IT professional working as a software developer. I have been living in the United States for more than a decade. Unfortunately, I was falsely accused of domestic violence involving false allegations and lies. As a result, I was embroiled in felony and misdemeanor charges

Mrs. Darlina Crowder is a seasoned criminal defense attorney. She is fearless, extremely aggressive in defending her clients, ethical, trustworthy, knowledgeable, experienced, and a truly strong individual in the courtroom.

When I first consulted Mrs. Crowder, she patiently listened to my version of events. She is an exceptional listener who carefully understands the details of a case. After reviewing my situation and going through the documentation I had, she was able to see through the case quickly. She assured me that she would do everything in her power to fight for me and pursue justice, even if it meant going all the way to a jury trial.

From the beginning, I saw that she was someone who stands by her word. She was not interested in pushing unnecessary plea deals and showed a clear willingness to fight directly in court when justice required it. At that moment, I truly felt that Almighty God had sent an angel to guide me through one of the darkest moments of my life.

Mrs. Crowder took over my case as lead counsel and thoroughly reviewed every detail, including family law records, documentation, and exhibits. Her preparation for trial was meticulous and relentless. We were fully prepared to present the truth before a jury.

Ultimately, just a few days before the scheduled trial, all the charges against me were DISMISSED.

I will always remain grateful to Mrs. Crowder for her fearless advocacy, integrity, and dedication to protecting my name, my career, and my future.

If you are facing serious criminal charges and want an attorney who is strategic, aggressive in the courtroom, ethical, and deeply committed to her clients, I highly recommend Mrs. Darlina Crowder.

I would also like to make a special note that Mrs. Crowder has successfully represented many clients from the Asian/Indian community and has experience handling cases involving complex cultural and family dynamics. Her ability to understand the background, context, and nuances involved in such situations is remarkable. Because of her experience and insight, she was able to approach my case with clarity and strategic thinking. I would strongly recommend Mrs. Crowder to anyone, including members of the Indian community, who may find themselves facing serious legal challenges. She is truly someone you want by your side when your future is on the line.

Darlina Crowder and The Crowder Law Firm are truly passionate about saving lives and working relentlessly for each and every client. reviews.text:
I’m deeply grateful for Crowder Law Firm, and especially for Darlina Crowder. I hired her during one of the darkest and most overwhelming periods of my life. I was facing a serious legal situation while also going through a painful family crisis, including separation from my son. Mentally and emotionally, I wasn’t okay, and I needed an attorney who could be relentless and sharp in court, but also steady, grounded, and genuinely human when everything felt like it was falling apart.

Darlina was exactly that.

From the beginning, she treated my case with urgency and purpose. She didn’t waste time on distractions, and she was direct about what mattered, what didn’t, and what would actually move the needle. Her approach was strategic, organized, and realistic, never sugarcoated, but always focused on protecting me and positioning the case the right way. As the court date got closer, her leadership became even more obvious. Just a week before trial, when anxiety and pressure were at their highest, she helped me stay structured, stay calm, and avoid mistakes that could have hurt my case. That kind of guidance matters more than people realize until they’re living it.

What stood out most is that she never treated me like “another file.” She understood the stakes weren’t just legal, they were personal, professional, and life-altering. She took the time to understand the bigger picture of what I was carrying, and she handled it with professionalism and empathy. She was firm when I needed discipline, clear when I needed direction, and steady when I needed reassurance. That balance is rare.

Her team also deserves real credit. They were responsive, professional, and consistent. I always felt that my defense was being handled seriously, with a lot of work happening behind the scenes, not just surface-level communication. Even when things were stressful, I didn’t feel ignored or left guessing. I felt supported and kept in the loop in a way that reduced panic and built trust.

Right before trial, when the pressure was at its peak, Darlina’s experience showed in every way. She knew how to frame the case, how to anticipate issues before they became problems, how to manage risk, and how to keep me from being pulled into unnecessary traps. She was prepared, sharp, and composed, exactly the kind of attorney you want when everything is on the line.

We ultimately achieved the best possible outcome for my situation, and I will always be thankful for her work and for how she carried herself during a time when I was barely holding it together. If you need a defense attorney who will fight hard, think clearly, communicate directly, and still treat you with compassion during a personal crisis, I strongly recommend Darlina Crowder and Crowder Law Firm.
reviews.ownerResponse: It was truly an honor to represent you. It was even more special when you and your family surprised our entire team last week after we received the State’s Motion to Dismiss. It’s days like those that make all of our long hours and late nights all worthwhile. I can tell you the news about your dismissals sent a ripple of cheers and tears throughout both of my offices. We were so excited for you because we understood the weight and the toll it took on you with these false allegations. We take these cases very serious and truly understand the severe consequences it has on someone’s life. Especially the potential consequences it had on yours. It was so nice meeting your family and friends as well. Thank you for the kind words about our team especially. It is sometimes hard to convey how hard our team works behind the scenes but I’m so glad you were able to see it and know that here at The Crowder Law Firm we work as a team. reviews.text:
This is only receiving a 3-star rating because Ms. Crowder kept me out of prison when I believed all hope was lost. For that, I am genuinely grateful. However, beyond that outcome, the treatment and interactions I experienced after my sentencing was completed have ensured that I will never do business with this firm again.

After completing my probation five years later, there were a few minor legal matters I needed to remedy. On my sentencing day, I was told directly by Darlina Crowder that upon completion of my probation, I would be able to use her services pro bono to resolve this minor issue. Once my probation was completed, not only was I met with doubt from her legal team regarding the validity of what she had told me, but I ultimately had to pay several hundred dollars to resolve the issue anyway. While frustrating, I agreed to pay because I wanted to put the entire situation behind me.

What followed was over a year and a half of miscommunication, being ignored, and clear frustration from lower-level staff who were unable to resolve the issue. Despite being described as “minor,” this matter played a pivotal role in the ease of my day-to-day life. After reaching my breaking point, I decided to investigate the issue myself. I identified the central hiccup in the stalled conflict with the opposing party in a single phone call—information that their team of professionals had been unable to obtain for over a year. I provided this information to their paralegals to forward to Ms. Crowder.

Approximately two weeks later, I received a call from Ms. Crowder herself, during which I was told that they had done all they could for me and that the issue was “my problem” to figure out. I informed her of the information I had already provided to her paralegals, but it was brushed off as illegitimate. During that same call, she asked me to send the information directly to her in real time so she could review it herself. Once she understood where the miscommunication was, my situation was resolved in less than a week.

Notably, there was no follow-up from her firm and no apology for the doubt, prolonged miscommunication, or lack of professionalism.

Again, I am grateful for what Ms. Crowder did for me in the past, and ultimately in this matter as well. However, the rudeness, dismissal, and disregard I experienced—especially after over a year of requesting to speak with her and after paying twice—was unacceptable. I sincerely hope I never need legal representation again, but if I do, this firm will never receive another penny from me.

reviews.text:
if you are going through a difficult time and need it a federal attorney don’t get Ms Crowder firm because in my experience she is Very unprofessional.
She failed to communicate, did not answer calls, and did not properly represent my husband’s case. Instead of fighting the case as requested, she delayed court until He served his full sentence. I would not recommend her
The Crowder Law firm works hard, is thorough, and works diligently, even late sometimes! Just to make sure their clients get the best representation. Such a great team who cares about their clients!

Over a year ago my life was turned upside down. I thought my dream was going to be taken away from me and the possibility of being without my family had my mental health at a horrible place.

But thanks to Jazmine and Denton at the crowder law firm I was found not guilty and I am finally smiling again and happier than ever. Jazmine and Denton fought for me and didn’t give up on me even when I gave up myself.

Thank you Jazmine and Denton!
Thank you crowder law firm!
reviews.ownerResponse: We’re so glad to hear this and truly appreciate you taking the time to share your experience. It means a lot to know our team could be there for you during such a difficult time. Wishing you continued happiness and all the best moving forward.

reviews.text: Alexa was very knowledgeable, and sat with me to explain the situation.

Colleen is professional and competent.  She is one an extremely very few attorneys in the area who will even look a medical negligence case.  She is a lawyer with a nurses background.  I would highly recommend her!!!
She wouldn't accept a complex yet very needed case to help people who were unfairly treated by a hospital and others. I guess not important enough..why did she become a lawyer exactly?

This review is solely regarding the lady who answered the phone. Rude and inconsiderate. Minimized my injury and  basically said it’s not that serious. I’m thankful I found a firm that is familiar with handling this type of claim. Wow, just wow lady. Horrible first impression, as you are the first point of contact for the firm.
I spoke with a representative over the phone who was very polite and professional when handling my request. I appreciate the level of expertise as well as the courteous nature of the interaction.

We are so thankful that we had Colleen Carboy on our side! After multiple attempts of trying to find an attorney who would help us after our elderly mother was physically assaulted, Colleen was the only one who was willing to meet with us. Her background as a nurse still shines through with the empathy and compassion she displayed toward us and especially with our mother. As for the attorney side of her, she fights for what is right and advocates for those who wouldn’t otherwise have a voice. She prepared us well for what to expect in the process and kept us in the loop every step of the way. We will forever be grateful to her for taking our case when nobody else would.

Colleen Carboy is a phenomenal champion for her clients.  She handled an egregious injury case involving our elderly mother and a well known, very expensive memory care facility in the metroplex.  We had a positive outcome thanks to Ms. Carboy's tireless efforts and her vast knowledge of both the medical and legal professions.  With the perfect balance of pragmatism and fierce advocacy, our family was in very capable hands and we always felt like we had the best representation possible for our situation.  Deserves more than five stars - A++!

I highly recommend Mrs. Colleen Carboy (attorney) for anyone needing help for a medical/personal injury situation.  She helped me tremendously and successfully through a very difficult and traumatic experience.  She was professional, understanding, friendly, knowledgeable and responded quickly to my calls.  Her expertise and follow through lead to me winning my case and being able to put the matter behind me with positive resolve and justice.

Extremely disappointed in my experience. I took a legal issue to them and they continually told me they were working on it. After over a year passed by, they told me they decided not to take the case because it would be their experts testimony against the experts of the hospital where my wife died. I later contacted several other attorneys to request they look at the case, but they all told me there was not enough time because the two year statute of limitations was approaching.
Made a no compete agreement go away.

Mr Wood was quick to return calls and was very friendly and willing to look over our case and consult us. (Unlawful Termination)
Highly recommend!
The best words that I can use to describe Eric Wood Law are competent, capable and above all else HONEST!! I would absolutely recommend them to family and friends!!
I have to say that EWL is just fantastic at getting things done
Leo is great. He handled my small claim case with the highest dedication, ethics and professionalism. I am so grateful to him.

Mr. Dvorak is a God send to our family. He has been our Attorney for several years. Nothing short of Professional. Gives 110%. Responsible, honest, trustworthy and patient. If you are looking for help,  call Bill.
I got his name from metlife legal plan.  Initial call asking if he represent educational matter.  Conversation didn't even take up to 30secs, he just hang up upon saying NO.
reviews.ownerResponse: The conversation did not end with a simple "No". It ended with a "No, I am sorry we do not handle those types of cases."

reviews.text: Was referred to Mr. Dvorak by a coworker.  Apparently he doesn't handle property law which he let me know abruptly before hanging up on me.  Not sure what kind of attorney is but he isn't a very decent person.
...and very friendly!

I am truly grateful for the outstanding service provided by Saldaña Collins Law Firm. Their team handled my family’s case with professionalism, integrity, and genuine care, making a difficult time much easier to navigate. Communication was clear and consistent, and we always felt supported and well represented. I highly recommend their firm to anyone!

I’m so happy with attorney Rebecca Saldaña Collins Law Firm services, because I never have in issue with them, they are really clarifying and honest.
Everything they’re telling me about what could happen that happens. A longer I’ll be in honest with them to.
I’m really happy with Saldaña Collins Law Firm Buffet. I’m really recommended to everyone. They need to understand that everyone situation is a different case.
Thanks 🙏 Saldaña Collins Law Firm Buffet to help us to make a dream come reality true

I recommend attorney Collins 100%. From the first appointment, she let me know if I had any chance of fixing my immigration status, and with great patience, she explained the process to me step by step. After a few months, I received my work permit and insurance. I visited several lawyers before, but none were interested in my case and told me I didn't qualify until I found attorney Collins. I recommend you go to her because for many years I thought I didn't qualify at all. I highly recommend her; she's very professional. She speaks our language and answers all our questions and doubts during the process. I thank God for having found her. Thank you very much, and blessings to her and her team.
Real nice and helpful, 100% recommend

Thanks to the lawyer and Rosa, I was able to obtain my residency after 25 years. Rosa was always available to answer my questions, no matter the time. They are trustworthy people. It was a difficult process for me, but thanks to them, I can now be with my family. Several family members have obtained their residency through them. They are professionals, and I highly recommend them. I am still working with them on another process, hoping it will be resolved soon. Thank you.
Really nice people and always try to help in anyway they can.

Thanks to a friend's recommendation, I went to see lawyer Rebeca and her team, who have always been honest and truthful. I arrived without hope because where many told me it couldn't be done, she gave me hope, and we continued the process. But I believe in God, who has the final answer for my case. Very soon I will give a review letting you know that it worked out. I just want to say thank you because I know she is the lawyer God sent to help me. Thank you, thank you, the best!
Excellent lawyer! They always answered my questions! Their assistant, Rosa, was very attentive and kept me well-informed about my immigration process. Thank you, Saldana Collins Law Firm
Beyond the commitment, very good work
She knows how to be the best immigration lawyer; she has proven it amply.

Since 2014, I have been renewing my DACA. Rosa has assisted me every time I have gone, and I consider her to be a very professional, kind, and respectful person with clients. I can definitely recommend this place.

The best immigration lawyer and her prices are very affordable. The service is perfect, including Rosita. My respects to that great lawyer. Thank you, Becky, for helping me and my daughter Gladys. May God continue to bless you abundantly for being the professional you are and will continue to be, a great example for all of Latin communication. Thank you, Rebecca.

I am very grateful to the lawyer for her work. She obtained my residency through my sister; she did an excellent job. Today, she delivered my wife's residency through my son, and I was surprised by how fast the process was—she delivered it in three months. If you want a good lawyer, I wholeheartedly recommend Attorney Saldaña. I am very grateful for the excellent work she did for us. Thank you so much, Attorney Saldaña, and your entire team. Blessings.

My name is Lina Machado, today is 3/5/26. I came to the lawyer's office today to pick up my residency permit. For me, she is the best lawyer, an honest and upright person. I highly recommend her. Thank you to lawyer Rebeca Saldaña and her team. Always kind, thank you.

They are excellent people. From the lawyer's assistant to the lawyer herself, everyone is very kind. The lawyer takes the time to answer your questions and explain your case in detail. The fee you'll pay for your case is the legally mandated amount, and the lawyer's fees are very reasonable. They are definitely worth choosing.

They helped my husband with his citizenship, and later they helped me with mine and my children's applications. All the processes have been handled by her. Highly recommended, excellent service, and absolute professionalism.
Excellent help, 10000% recommended for any case. Imgracoom provides excellent service and is very kind and attentive throughout the entire process.

Rebecca Collin’s is the sweetest & smartest person i’ve talked to! i previously talked to a different lawyer & was nowhere close as good as Rebecca! on the first meeting she helped me reach out & get a signature for Visa U. She explains everything & will for sure find you the right path. i’m very satisfied with the work i’ve done with rebecca!

I highly recommend Attorney Rebeca. She and Rosa are a great team; they always kept in touch with us and provided my husband and me with excellent service.
Thank you, and blessings.
Great experience and very honest

I had an excellent experience with Saldana Collins Law Firm PLLC. Rebecca is an incredibly professional and knowledgeable attorney who truly cares about her clients. What stood out to me the most is that their support doesn’t stop once you file or pay your legal fees — they remain available to answer questions and provide guidance throughout the entire process.
The firm is very responsive and provides outstanding customer service. Rosa, the paralegal, is especially helpful and always quick to respond. She made communication smooth and stress-free.
My change of status case went perfectly and within the timeframe they initially estimated. There were no mistakes in my filing or application package, and everything was handled with precision and care. Overall, it was a great experience, and I highly recommend them.

My experience with attorney Rebeca and her assistant Rosa was excellent. They were incredibly helpful with my case, and thanks to them, I'm now with my family in the United States. My wife's family has been working with them for years because they are so efficient.

The law firm helped me in a civil dispute. The attorney was prompt and effective. She kept us informed during the entire process. Can’t say enough good things about the staff and attorney. 10/10 will use again.
I want to give my opinion about the lawyer. Her assistant asked me for $150 for a 5-minute phone call with the lawyer. She never gave me an answer about my case. I paid $150 and I felt scammed.
reviews.ownerResponse:
As of 3/14/2026 this individual has declined a followup free consultation. The attorney has contacted her on two separate occassions. The individual has declined to elaborate the reasons for her complaint.

Our records show that the attorney did speak with you on January 8, 2026 and our time log shows it was well beyond the 5 minutes stated above. Our office reached out to you upon reading this review and attempted to clarify any confusion. The attorney also spoke to you and offered a followup consultation free of charge. We pride ourselves in promptly following up with any individual that feels they did not get quality service. We hope we can clarify this situation. Please feel free to reach out to us as soon as possible. 972-369-0307.

I want to thank attorney Rebeca and her assistant Rosa—a fantastic team! If you have a case and need an honest and dedicated lawyer, this is the firm to call. I highly recommend it!

Rebecca's law firm is the best; I recommend it 100%. They tell you the truth and help you as much as possible. They are very kind and treat you like family. Her assistant, Rosa, is very pleasant and always willing to help you with everything. For me, they are the best.

I'm so grateful to everyone here. May God always guide you and give you wisdom to help our community.

She helped me a lot; she's intelligent, does excellent work, very professional and fast.

Great service.
And always willing to help. I can only say THANK YOU VERY MUCH.

Outstanding customer service, I was completely impressed with their professionalism and attention.

Gracias absolutas!!
They helped a lot . Very professional and friendly. Been with them for years. Le recomiendo a la abogada muy amable y profesional.
Thank you so much for your help!!

I have been working with Saldaña and team for a while now. They helped me renew my DACA several times and when eligible, they assisted with my residency. They also helped with my parents case and they were able to return to their birth country after 24+ years.
If you are searching for legal help Im sure you are looking at different options and comparing pricing to help you decide on who to go with. I recommended their team time and time again. They are responsive, compassionate and know their clients. They have offered us peace of mind and have handle our cases with care. Rebecca and Rosa are truly amazing!
Excellent service 100% recommended
I highly recommend the law firm Saldaña Collins. They are kind and very professional, they handle your case with responsibility and commitment. It's an excellent decision ❤️

Laura Roach’s did not provide me, a brown person against a white husband, the same level of service or attention she provided my white woman friend against a brown husband who had an identical divorce custody situation. She mediated an outcome reverse for what she got for my friend.  I had to fire her once I realized her ability to advocate for me fairly was impaired and was shocked at her billing for time when my ex-husband told me she had not come to the meeting and had kept them waiting.

It was very costly to unwind her mistakes. But the other law firm was shocked at how she gave away my rights in what was an open shut case.

I’m sure there are good attorneys here at this firm.  Just run from Laura.  She has this same track record of slovenly work and bad reviews from any firm she’s been involved with.

Mr. Ricci & Ms. Roach were phenomenal in helping me beat a car company who sold me a lemon. No other lawyers would agree to take on my case because they were intimidated by the other company, but this firm got the job done! They are experts who are ethical and care! I highly recommend them!

Kylie ( and team) is UNSTOPPABLE. To say she is AMAZING is an understatement. Her prompt responses, quick, and strategic thought process when dealing with my case gave me the peace I needed. I would 1000% recommend her for ANY case within the DFW area. Mccathern Law will continue to be UNSTOPPABLE with her on there team.
Didn’t hear us out properly and hung up the call. Never answered the call back..
reviews.ownerResponse: Hi Mittal, we're truly sorry to hear about your experience. We strive to provide excellent customer service and it's disappointing to hear that we fell short in this instance. We value your feedback and will address this issue with our team to ensure it doesn't happen again. Thank you for bringing this to our attention. If you would like to discuss further, please email us at contact@mccathernlaw.com.

reviews.text: Michael Ricchi is professional, highly recommended and makes you feel like you matter in a time that can feel uneasy and unknown. Although I ended up not needing further assistance to my matter, he followed up to make sure I was ok. That’s real service!
reviews.ownerResponse: Andrea, thank you so much for sharing your positive experience with Michael Ricchi! We're thrilled to hear that he provided you with top-notch service and made you feel valued. We appreciate your feedback and hope to have the opportunity to assist you again in the future.

reviews.text: I worked with McCathern law firm and specifically Kylie Peebles.  I made the choice because they aligned with my desired outcome.  Through any legal dispute, it can be difficult to filter out emotions and stay with the best strategy to reach your goals.  Kylie handled the moat complex issues the same way she handled basic day to day communication - efficient, quick, and mindful of what our vision was for the end.  Highly Recommend this law firm and specifically Kylie for her practice.
reviews.ownerResponse: Hi Bryan, thank you for taking the time to share your experience with McCathern Law Firm and Kylie Peebles. We are thrilled to hear that Kylie was able to assist you efficiently and effectively in reaching your desired outcome. We appreciate your recommendation and look forward to serving you in the future.

reviews.text: Kylie is an excellent, efficient, and focused attorney. I felt immediately comfortable working with her. She was very clear about the options I had and helped me make the best decision for my situation. I'm very grateful to her and highly recommend her to anyone that is looking to get things done!
reviews.ownerResponse: Regina, thank you so much for your kind words about Kylie! We're thrilled to hear about your positive experience and satisfaction with her legal services. Your recommendation means a lot to us and we look forward to assisting you or anyone you refer in the future.

reviews.text: Kylie Peeples is an excellent family law attorney.  I’m her opposing counsel in a case, and she is an above-the-board, straight shooter with the ability to find practical solutions to messy problems.  She’s most certainly worth a look.
reviews.ownerResponse: Hi Philip, thank you for sharing your positive experience with Kylie Peeples. We're glad to hear that she impressed you with her professionalism and problem-solving skills. If you ever need any more legal assistance, feel free to reach out. We appreciate your feedback!

reviews.text:
Laura Roach ....I can never thank you enough for your patience, skills, kindness, and all around genuine good hearted soul you are !  You are so rare in this crazy world of divorce. Four years have gone by since you have helped my son and I escape a stressful situation with my ex husband. Without you we could not be living our best life. Lawyers do not have the prettiest reputation, however Laura managed to breath positive life in me while the outside world was sucking all my air and energy out of me for almost 2 years. She was my rock and still is every time I have sent my friends to her. More and more you see people quick to give negative reviews because it is easy,  it is not popular for people to give great reviews  or compliments because we are lazy (in my opinion).  Giving thanks and being grateful is becoming lost. If you need an attorney, you will instantly know Laura has a giving soul.. you see it, feel it and I can say it after 4 years and all the folks she helps. She does not have to do what she does but she chooses the right path to help. Love you 🥰

xo Cristina

I felt very supported by the team at McCathern ; Kylie Peebles and Adriana Cancino really helped me wade through my "easy', yet complicated divorce.  Kylie responded quickly to my questions and her calmness and reasoning helped me keep my mind on the end goal and not the emotions.   Going through a divorce and all that is involved can be one of the worst experiences in life;  I appreciated Kylie's feedback and meeting with me in person to help me make the best decisions for me.
Kylie Peebles was fantastic to work with. She was attentive, answered all my questions, and was quick to respond to emails. I highly recommend her and her team.

Kylie was such an incredible blessing for me and my family. She did a great job handling our case/situation and guided us through the gauntlet that is the family court system. Her expertise and professionalism helped keep my family together and won me the opportunity to be the father my kids my deserve. Kylie and Lyndsey and co. constantly kept me up to date on any information regarding my case and we couldn't have asked for better representation.

Michael Ricchi and Laura Roach were my attorneys and I cannot recommend them enough. Michael was a beacon of hope to my family at a time when our options appeared limited and the likelihood of a satisfactory resolution felt impossible. Not only was he able to fix the mistakes of our previous legal counsel within days, his calm and empathetic demeanor was much needed and helped calm me and the deescalate our situation. I was so pleased with the outcome of our case, it was better than what we originally asked the courts for. Michael was such an excellent advocate, provided honest and realistic counsel and was very supportive of our family. His knowledge of the law and the courts impressed me and made me feel more confident about our case. My children and I are eternally grateful for his service and I recommend Mr. Ricchi without reservation. Laura Roach consulted on our case and was attentive, very helpful, kind and understanding. Her knowledge helped us navigate out of a seemingly impossible situation. As soon as I met with her I felt like my children had an advocate and became hopeful that things would get better for our case and they did. Laura is so caring and really made me feel like my children’s well-being was her only priority and I am forever grateful. I recommend them to all of my friends and will happily hire them again if the need ever arises.

Kylie Peebles helped me so much throughout my divorce. She and her team (Lyndsey & Adrianna) were absolutely amazing! Kylie always makes you feel completely heard when you meet with her or email. She was there for me and fought to make sure my divorce was handled properly. I can never thank her enough for everything she did to get me to this point! I'm happy to refer anyone to her in the future, and in fact, already have.

Kylie Peebles made my divorce process easy, quick and efficient. Kylie exceeded my expectations, she was simply amazing. She is fair, super responsive and knowledgeable. From date of filing to signing was under 75 days. I met with several attorneys after deciding to file for divorce and once I met Kylie I knew she was the one. Billing is extremely fair and transparent. I highly recommend Kylie you will not be disappointed!

I worked with Laura Roach and Kyle Peebles, they were both amazing.  They were very quick to respond and also always had my best interest in mind.  I highly recommend them and would definitely use them again.

I worked directly with Kyle Peebles and she was nothing short of amazing.  She was quick to respond, fair, had a listening ear through this difficult time, and came up with a solution for all involved that ended up not even needing mediation. I would recommend Kylie and her team over and over again! I can't say enough great things about her!

Kylie Peebles is exactly what you want from an attorney: she's extremely communicative, effective at getting the ideal outcome, and will put in the work to get you in the best position possible.

She's handled a diverse set of legal questions for me and I've had nothing but pleasant experiences. I definitely highly recommend Kylie.
Fantastic Law Firm. Best in Texas!! Noah has been great a council for me for years
Kylie Peebles was outstanding, she was very professional and understanding.   I highly recommend her service as well as her staff.  Thank you Kylie is was a pleasure.

I wanted to laud McCathern Law and specifically my lawyer Michael Ricchi and his team (Emily Hale and Chelsea Ragsdale) who represented and guided me through my divorce.  They were so supportive and responsive to me I never felt alone or ignored.  They were very informative and walked me through every step of the process including preparations, mediation and a few final actions that were unusual in my case as I am a military retiree.  I did shop around before I picked McCathern and I'm so happy I chose them to lead me through a most difficult period in my life.

Laura Roach is a fantastic mediator. She is scrappy but also creative in resolving some of the toughest cases. As a family law attorney, my clients have always raved about her as a mediator. I love her approach where she presents a mediator’s proposal.
Laura Roach is a LEADER in North Texas Family law.  I know when I refer folks to her facing family law issues they will be well taken care of and are in great hands!

Laura Roach and the McCathern Firm were referred to me and others by two separate sources - they said if you want the best, go with Laura. She was intuitive, professional, responsive, and efficient. I am thankful for her.

Very disappointed - scheduled a "complimentary consultation" and had a clerk call me who wasn't listening to what I wanted and didn't have answers to my questions - just kept pushing a "package" I would have to purchase that would include what I originally was inquiring about.  It was more of a "selling" call than a consultation - at least have someone reaching out that has the knowledge if a lawyer themselves isn't going to.

I can’t recommend Amy Jenkins’ team enough!
Amy was incredibly helpful and supportive, guiding my dad through both his estate planning with care and attention. She made a complex process feel simple and understandable, always taking the time to answer our questions and provide clear guidance.
The personal attention, professionalism, and dedication the team showed truly went above and beyond. I’m so grateful for her help in making sure everything was handled smoothly and correctly!
reviews.ownerResponse:
Camie, thank you so much for your kind words and for taking the time to share your experience.

It was truly our privilege to assist your dad with his estate planning, and we’re so glad we could help make the process feel clear and manageable for your family. We understand that these conversations can sometimes feel overwhelming, so it means a lot to hear that you felt supported and well guided throughout the process.

Thank you again for trusting our team with such an important matter. We’re always here if you or your family ever need anything in the future.

Warmly,
Amy and Team

reviews.text: Amy and her team are absolutely wonderful! I know how important having an estate plan in place is, and after having wasted money trying to “do it myself” they explained all options and then expertly and thoroughly guided me through the Trust process. Amy also created a Special Needs Trust for my son and helped him with his important legal documents. To have this all in place gives me such peace of mind. The binders are beautiful and the documents are professional, accurate, and detailed, along with step by step instructions for successor Trustees etc. Amy’s compassion and caring and expert legal advice is priceless.
reviews.ownerResponse:
Sonja, thank you so much for your kind words. It truly means everything to us.

We know how important it is to have a thoughtful plan in place to protect the people you love, and we’re honored that you trusted us to guide you through this process to help you create a plan that supports both you and Ryne.

Knowing that your plan gives you peace of mind is exactly why we do this work. Thank you again for trusting our firm to be part of such an important step for your family.

Warmly,
Amy and Team

reviews.text: Amy guided us through our family trust and estate planning with such kindness and expertise. Your recommendation is such a gift to us. Please know that we’re always here if questions come up or if your needs change in the future. Wishing you and your family peace of mind and all the best moving forward.

The Law Offices of Amy L. Jenkins

It’s truly an honor to help bring peace of mind to you and your family and guide you through this process. We’re always here for you!

reviews.text:
When we were faced with an unexpectedly urgent need to get a handle on our estate planning I first thought that I would just do it myself because we're just average people with basic assets.  There were a lot of details to assemble and questions I couldn't answer when I tried the self-help route, so I ignored the whole mess until a second emergency surgery made me realize it was time ask for help.  I am so very thankful that the person I reached out to was Amy Jenkins.

She has made every part of sorting through the needs of our blended and somewhat crazy family straightforward and her assistance gave us a very workable roadmap for getting things set for whatever happens next.  She helped us get a clearer view of our options and helped us document our choices to ensure a seamless transition when the worst happens.  I'm saddened by the need for her services, but so very relieved that neither of us will be making these decisions in haste or will have to question what the other wanted when the time comes.
reviews.ownerResponse: Thank you so much for sharing your experience! We're delighted that we could assist you in such a meaningful way with your estate planning. It sounds like we really made a difference in simplifying a complex process for you and your family. We're glad to have been there for you and hope this brings you peace of mind. If you ever need more assistance or have any questions, please feel free to reach out. Wishing you and your loved ones all the best!

reviews.text: The best place for any estate planning needs from education to planning! Amy and her staff are less intimidating than I thought possible for a team of estate planners. They made me feel comfortable asking the silliest of questions about their industry, and I walked away equipped with so much more knowledge on navigating the minefield that is our legal system. If you feel overwhelmed with your legal situation, this is the best place to start and get some clarity from a professional!
reviews.ownerResponse: Thank you Abigail! For such a kind and glowing review! We are so glad you found the education and felt comfortable.

reviews.text: Working with Amy was an incredible experience. We were stressed and scared, not knowing where to start, what we needed, what to do, but knowing it's too important to put off. Amy put us at ease right away. She clearly explained all and every option, and gave us complete peace of mind while we decided which option we felt best for our family. She helped us every step of the way and we now feel secure, our children are secure, and it is a huge weight lifted knowing we have the best plan in place. We know Amy is there for us anytime, and very thankful for the whole process. I highly recommend her, don't wait!
reviews.ownerResponse:

Thank you so much for taking the time to share your heartfelt experience. It truly means a lot to hear that working together helped bring you peace of mind and security for your family’s future. Knowing that I could guide you through each step and provide clarity during what can be a stressful process is why I do what I do.

It was an honor to be part of your planning journey, and I’m here for you anytime you need assistance. Thank you for your trust and your kind recommendation. Wishing you and your family continued peace and security.

reviews.text:
My husband and I were referred to Amy Jenkins through some friends who had recently utilized her estate planning services.
Going through the critically important task of securing your estate, let alone finding a lawyer who is a good fit (I had researched and connected with four other lawyers before our friend's referral) is a daunting and intimidating process for the average person. Before Amy met with us for our consultation, I had researched her on-line. Unlike any of the other lawyers I'd been in contact with, she had taken the time to create and post multiple blogs regarding the vital need for estate planning. These blogs were highly informative, so I had a good feeling before we even met her.
From the moment we contacted and met with Amy, I knew we were in great hands. From start to finish she was more than gracious, patient, and available to help us work through the complexities. She took a potentially pain-stalking process and made it simple and streamlined. She went out of her way to explain to us our options, and patiently accommodated our many questions.  She helped us navigate the tough and sometimes uncomfortable yet crucial conversations regarding life's inevitable stages.
These days it is so hard to find good old-fashioned customer service. Never have we felt rushed with Amy or that it was hard to get a hold of her or her team. We definitely felt service excellence with Amy, Monica, Danielle, Rosie (and others). Getting our affairs in order and the huge sense of relief it has created is because of Amy's care and expertise.
We feel so blessed to have Amy by our side!
reviews.ownerResponse: Jami, we are blessed to have clients like you! We are so pleased you have found peace and relief in getting your planning in order. We strive to educate our clients and help them navigate these decisions. Cheers to gold old-fashioned customer service!

I want to share my experience with Scott Edgett and his team, because finding an attorney who truly stands with you is not something you come across often.

What impressed me most was the way Scott took the time to understand me as a whole person. He did not treat my situation like something routine or transactional. He took time to learn what I valued, what I feared, and what outcome would allow my family and me to move forward in peace. That meant more to me than I can express.

There were moments when I felt overwhelmed and unsure of what would come next. Scott always approached those moments with calm guidance and steady confidence. He would walk me through the choices in front of me, not telling me what I had to do but helping me gain the clarity and strength to make decisions I felt good about. His team showed the same level of kindness and professionalism. When I had questions, they explained things with patience.

Scott is not only an excellent attorney. He is a strong advocate who listens, a leader who reassures, and a person who shows up when it matters. I am grateful for the way he handled both the legal side and the human side of what I went through. If you are looking for representation that is both skilled and compassionate, I would trust Scott and his team again without hesitation.

reviews.text: They are very attentive, especially the lawyer Marisol, who always explains everything in detail.
Scammer!  He works with other SCAMMERS LIKE HIM to take peoples houses away!! They take advantage of people who don’t have money for a scammer lawyer like him

I'm currently working with this lawyer, Edna Chavez. She's helped us a lot personally. I really like her professionalism, the kindness with which she treats us, and all the help she's given us. I'm truly grateful! Thank you, Edna. May God bless you!

This man went well out of his way to hear my voice mail and return my call. He gave freely of his time and knowledge and was genuinely pleasant to visit with. 100% recommended this man based purely on his being genuine and generous

Unethical lawyer. DO NOT use this guy. Youve been warned! He will take your case and youll spend countless days and nights trying to reach him. Your court date will come and go and this guy wont pick up the phone. Never seen anything like it.

Ken is an amazing attorney very knowledgeable, professional and easy to talk to.  If you want somebody who is going to fight hard, then he is the guy for you!.   He doesn’t give up easily and if he encounters an obstacle he will figure out another legal ways to make it happen.  He was of great assistance to me and my family and I wouldn’t hesitate to use his services again and again.  I would recommend him to anybody I know.  You need to have him as part of your legal team!

I am Frances Damon Briggs; Attorney Harter, every single word of my review regarding you is true, and you know it. You stated that you got me everything I wanted and more. Name at least One (1) asset from my 27 years of marriage that you "got me"? ... You can't. You did no one a favor. You even gave my former husband assets which Attorney Frank Shor had gotten me, as my marital property before he passed away. It was not the terms of the Plan which prevented my payment under your prepared QDRO. It was the terms of your prepared QDRO which prevented my payment. That tax-qualified Plan is subject to Section 414(p) of the IRC, which governs the ASSIGNMENT of marital pension assets in a dissolution of marriage. According to the "terms of the Plan", the early retirement age is age 55. My former husband was 57. According to the "terms of the Plan" benefit payments to a former spouse under a QDRO (me), begin the earliest date that the Participant is eligible to receive a payment from the Plan (if permitted by the QDRO) (Even if he had not received a payment). Section 414(p)(4)(A) of the IRC provides for distribution to the Alternate Payee as soon as the Participant reaches the "Earliest Retirement Age" under the Plan (again, which is age 55). Further, according the terms of your prepared QDRO I would have never received a penny because, you did not include the federal QDRO requirements. How could an attorney with over 38 yrs of practice, forget to include the federal requirements of a QDRO? Sir, the money from my former husband's Plan is all that I was to have (after you gave my other awarded assets to my former husband) I have been homeless, I have had to sleep in my vehicle, in neighbors homes and different family members, from couch to couch ... etc, all because you would not have the Order amended. I walked away with not even a Penny. So, I ask you again "What did you get me?" As far as paying you ... with what and for what? Are you saying that you did not get paid at all??... Sir, even your response to your reviews shows your true character. Instead of lying and becoming combative humble yourself, vow to do better, then do better. I understand that God is in control. I did not write the review out of some malicious intent. You are in a position to help people or hurt them. Be a person of Integrity. You left my son and I in a disaster and although my trust is in God, people need to know of your ethics. F.Y.I. I have not been "blowing up" your inbox. Maybe it's your conscience. ~Regards

reviews.ownerResponse: Thanks for taking the time to post this.  Very much appreciated.

reviews.text: Nick Davis helped me through a very stressful time. His sound legal advice and strong work ethic resulted in a positive outcome in my case. Nick is kind, considerate, and most importantly a very competent attorney. He is not fee-driven and genuinely wants to win. Nick will give it to you straight regarding the merits of your case.

I highly recommend this law firm! Going through a divorce is hard enough and working with Mr. Davis made a difficult situation truly easy for me. I was not looking forward to it not working out and then prolonging my problem. However, my phone calls and emails were answered promptly and my concerns were quickly dismissed. If you need any kind of help, these are the attorneys you need!
Best attorneys ever met all my needs very professional I highly recommend them you not regret choosing the best

Nick and his associate Terrance will promise you the world to get the retainer, and then do whatever it takes to stay out of trial! They were fast to reply back to calls, but once retainer was paid could never get them to respond back to messages or calls! Stay away from their overpriced services, because you will be left disappointed just like we were! And even after the case was over, took forever to finally get a signed copy of the orders! DO NOT RECOMMEND!

I had a consultation with nick Davis it took him no time to reach out to me and talk with me!!!He was the only attorney who had reached back out to me so fast it only took him a few hrs!!!! He was very sweet very helpful and let me know everything I needed to know and was AMAZING at answering questions i didn't even remember to ask!!! I would use him as my Attorney for ANYTHING!!! He’s amazing and he Cares!!!! This would definitely be the attorney you’re looking for!!! I search and search and went thru 5 attorneys before I found this amazing man, Nick Davis Thank you !!!!!!
Terrence did a fantastic job for us, and we highly recommend him and this law firm. Very friendly and knowledgeable.

Dear my attorney- I am writing this  to express my most sincere thanks for the most professional work you did for me . You have stuck by me  in dealing with this very stressful case. I admire your composure, work ethic and most of all excellent representation, listening ability, humility, goal orientation, teamwork, innovation, understanding the "why," effective communication, and adaptability
Thank you again for the hard work

Amazing lawyer along with his long time friend Mr. Nick Davis and Mr. Bill Kennedy. I had a crucial 6-day trial with the CPS (or rather CKS for child kidnapping services) and we had a unanimous win from 12 jurors! I owe a lot of this to how he has strategized, quick to notice nuances and details and make the right judgment calls, and the way he preps in a fast moving situation from the beginning to the end. Really couldn't have done this intensive case without him. He has gone out of his way to help and in the end turned what would have been a terrible tragedy around! Please find him if you find yourself in trouble. He'll help you.

We got a call back for our consultation within an hour or so of giving them our info. Nick listened to our story and laid out our options clearly.  Everything was very straightforward and easy to understand. We don't know if we will end up retaining a lawyer, but the consultation alone was full of useful information and advice. Glad we spoke with them.

He was very helpful even though I wasn't able to get his services he was very understanding and giving me a free consultation and telling me some useful very good advice. Not all lawyers will hear you or tell you what options you have and/or tell you what he would do after telling them that you can't or aren't going to hire him to represent you ! Very helpful and straight forward. I called after hours too, and i didn't expect any one to call me till next day but he was the only one that responded back after hours (6:30ish -7pm) for me that is a plus, when we need help or want answers we want them fast and Nick helped me that same day, for free and gave me his advice no strings attached!
I would NEVER recommend them , I had to drive 6hours to get my court documents because the my 6,000$ lawyer couldn’t do her job!!!

Attorney Mazen represented me in an assault case based on a false allegation, and the outcome was Not Guilty. From the beginning, he was strategic, calm, and extremely intelligent in how he handled the case.

What stood out most was that he truly understood my personal situation. He didn’t treat me like just another case number
,  he listened, analyzed every detail, and built a defense that was smart and precise. His courtroom strategy was calculated and confident, and it clearly made the difference.

If you are facing criminal charges and need someone who is sharp, strategic, and genuinely invested in your case, I highly recommend Attorney Mazen. He is an amazing criminal defense attorney.

I highly don’t recommend this law firm team.

Everyday we would call to speak to the lawyer due to concerns we had with our legal issues and not ONCE did the lawyer call us back. His secretary’s would answer and would guarantee the lawyer would call us back and we never got a call back UNTIL THIS DAY

Super unprofessional specially when you hire someone to fight for your legal issues.

HIGHLY DONT RECOMMEND

These attorneys are the best! They really helped us when we needed it and got us a successful result! Thank you so much for your skill and professionalism.

This is Truly the Worst Law Firm In Dallas you are literally better off going with a court appointed lawyer then this law firm I’ve been fighting misdemeanor charges for over a year now and don’t even know my lawyer and they act like they don’t know my case I paid 3k for two misdemeanors and nothing is resolved they don’t show up to court I’ve had multiple warrants the bondsman would call they didn’t even put there name on my case when I paid them in full do not recommend go somewhere else if you have a small charge go with a court appointed literally worst law firm ever
