Thank you for helping me. 🙏🏽

Phenomenal law firm, helped me with a delicate family matter, Michael, Diana, and linsey(spelled it wrong sorry) helped me through the entire process and really helped me achieve dismissal. Great law firm I will suggest them to everyone I meet. Hope to never have to call again. But if I do
I know who I'm calling.
Horrible lack of communication. I call for updates on my case and constantly given the run around.
reviews.ownerResponse:
Hi Karie — We’re sorry to hear about your experience. After checking our records, we don’t show a client by that name, so it’s possible this review was meant for another firm.

If you believe this does involve our office, please give us a call at (972) 370-5060 or email info@lllawgroup.com so we can look into it right away. We take communication seriously and want to make sure every concern is addressed.

reviews.text:
I paid $4,500 for legal representation for my son and, unfortunately, never saw the attorney again after the initial meeting. Instead, I was contacted by different people who didn’t seem to know anything about my case and constantly had to ask basic questions that the attorney should have already known. It quickly became clear that there was no real communication or consistency in how my case was being handled.

To make matters worse, I even received a call “reminding me of court” but  requesting a payment I had already made through CashApp—a major red flag. When I tried to discuss my concerns, no one ever called me back or made any effort to resolve the issue. They offered to meet in office when they called to check on the payment lol.

I expected professionalism, transparency, and communication, but got the exact opposite. I’m extremely disappointed and would not recommend this attorney to anyone looking for reliable legal help.

Edited to add: if you’re not prepared to issue a full refund, take the L on this review like I did financially by picking YOU😎 I will NOT remove the review.

My attorney was Mazen and he was very communicative, and kept me within the loop regarding my case. Case went to trial and was dismissed. If you are in search of a law firm definitely get in contact with L & L and request Mazen

Very happy with my results! They got me off of probation early and they let me know ahead of time that I was going to be taking a hair follicle drug test ! $1,000 and they got me off of probation in 1 month. Trust these people! Thank you again for my freedom 👋
Amazing experience L & L law group very professional Mazen was very helpful
very bad communication i ended up having to hire a real professional lawyer just pay the extra guys
Great communication and response time. You will definitely be taken care of. Highly recommended

Horrible .. I don’t have much experience with attorneys and criminal situations . But if this is the service that is out there today OMG !!On my date to appear before the judge .   This lady (rep l&l) came rushing up to me  LATE  out of breath, didn’t even look prepared telling me she was Told to take care of me  and this situation will be easy. I had never met her before .so while trying to give her a little case history , my name was called to come to see the judge . The DA and judge were asking questions and saying things she didn’t even know and sounded like she didn’t understand , needless to say I went to jail that day (never been in trouble before)
I didn’t even get to take advantage of a pre trail release this lady blew my whole case messed me up .. I have kids I had to pick up from school and  I was not prepared to come up with thousands of dollars to Bond out !! This was not the attorney that I met at the office and explained my was case to that made all these promise how they would take care of my case ..
L&L law group is doing excellent work and  amazing experience to join this group .They resolve every problem with great enthusiasm 🙂

I reached out to London and London regarding a very complicated serious criminal matter. From our first consultation it was clear they  knew exactly what they were doing they explained  everything in details of what may and may not happen. Josh was the attorney that handled our case he went above and beyond  explained everything to us step by step during the whole process the outcome of this matter was to our favor. I highly recommend London & London law firm they are not just skilled attorneys but compassionate as well.
Sincerely,
Mrs Gates and family.

Reggie London and Mazen saw my case through from start to finish, I was very happy with their level
Of communication and sound legal advice. Didn’t charge an arm and leg and helped me get the situation handled.
Mazen Radaydeh and Michael Casillas are great lawyers They clarified all my queries and appreciate their support and time.I am very thankful for them.

From the secretary, who picked up when I first called all the way to the lawyer himself I was taken care of in a very friendly and kind manner. Highly recommend for anyone very good and fair law firm.

L and L Law Group is absolutely amazing! They resolved my case with the exact outcome I was hoping for. Communication was stellar—they returned my calls almost immediately and were always patient, no matter how many questions I had. A special shoutout to my personal lawyer, Ms. Elaine, who worked tirelessly on my behalf and made sure I understood everything along the way. I truly felt supported throughout the entire process.
20/10 recommend L and L Law Group!

I would never go through another black owned company again they really didn’t do anything I couldn’t done myself the communication was poor and the wife had a typical attitude. I don’t like to do this but I didn’t have very good help would not recommend ever again.Im stuck with a DUI misdemeanor on my background. I should of just taken the sanction lol.

THE BEST EVER THEY COMMUNICATED WITH ME AND MY SON I DIDNT FEEL LIKE A BOTHER THEY GOT MY SON HOME WHEN I FELT LIKE ALL HOPE WAS GONE I WANT TO THANK THEM ALL EVERYONE WAS RESPECTFUL EVERYONE WAS HELPFUL I CANT THANK YOU ALL ENOUGH
Hard to get in contact with after you paid your money. The lawyer you hire you will never talk to again.

My experience with this law firm was truly exceptional, exceeding all expectations.  The team's dedication and expertise were evident throughout the entire process.  I especially want to commend Lindsey, Mrs. London, and Regi for their outstanding contributions to my case.  Their professionalism and compassionate approach made a significant difference during a challenging time.  I wholeheartedly recommend their services to anyone seeking legal assistance.

Do not hire these charlatans if you want to keep you or your loved ones out of prison! They exists solely to steal your money. This was my experience. I paid half the fee upfront $1500 and this what happened. I would show up to court and check in and wait outside in the hallway. A lawyer would come in my case either Mike or Njeri London herself, they would go in the court room and come out 5 mins later then say I could go home. This what was what went on for several months and all they would tell me is that they were waiting for discovery. Between Mike and Njeri one did not know what was going on with the other. I'm facing a misdemeanor and a felony and Mike had no idea what was going on with my felony and the best answer he gave me was "we HOPE the prosecutor won't want go to trial".
Mike also never brought me any offer from the prosecutor and when I asked him why not he told me he forgot that I told him too and he was sorry. As for Mrs London she just showed up mostly late to my court appearances and had no idea what was going on. I asked how.are we waiting in discovery 6 months later and she had no answer. I also asked Mike has he gone down to see the evidence against me and he said no and I asked him why not and he caught and attitude with me and said "He will try" and I told him it's my right to see the evidence against me. Then I get an email saying I have a jury trial coming up so I'm shocked and I immediately call them up and ask what's going on and a rude secretary threatened me by saying they need the other half of the payment or they will withdraw from my case. I immediately put in a search for a new law firm and found one and spoke to the lead lawyer for and hour and a half and in that amount of time while he was at home with dogs barking in the background told me more than this scam of a firm had in 8 months. So basically he explained that all my extentions aka passes were used up and I would be going to trial. So basically these scammers had me going back and forth to court while doing absolutely nothing to help me all the while collecting money and demanding more. Njeri London also had on fancy jewelery and dresses and perfume and shoes and I now she where she got them from.

I hired a new lawyer to fix the mess these horrible lawyers got me into because if left up to them I would be sitting in prison and they would be on to their next victim. It's a shame because I went out of my way to find a black law firm who would fight for me a black man(for added context Mike is white) but I was sadly mistaken and will not make that mistake again. My new lawyer said my case could have been over and done with many months ago most likely with probation if handled properly and now he has to work some lawyer magic to set things back on track which I'm confident he will do because he seems competent unlike Mike and Njeri London.

For the love of God pay a little more at an actual law firm and treat L&L Law firm like the Bubonic Plague and stay far away if you value your life and freedom. They do not care about you they only care about money and do not care if you rot in prison!

I would highly recommend to spend the extra money and take your business elsewhere. The staff had zero communication. I was given a number to call or text for questions, and they never responded. The day before my court case I was trying to get some information, and my texts were constantly ignored. The day of my court date, the lawyer was late. Fast forward, my case was dismissed and I’ve been calling for months for the dismissal papers they said I should be receiving and still no response. My court date was back in August and I can’t believe how hard it is to get a hold of someone to send me a piece of paper . The place is okay for those expecting the absolute bare minimum for legal help.
Reggie London was phenomenal and handled my inquiries quickly and with precision. It was a breath of fresh air to have speedy service and greatly appreciated.

Very compassionate I been stuck not able to go on with life because of legal matters that I couldnt afford to hire a lawyer. Very professional look forward to working with them and come back to up date success with this amazing couple!

I appreciate your efforts on the case

I felt confident knowing they were handling everything and the outcome was better than expected. highly recommend.  L&L Law group to anyone in need of strong legal representation!

Terrible communication. I wish they would’ve just told me upfront they don’t care. Did all the footwork with the prosecutor myself and they couldn’t even send me my court paperwork until over a month later. I was initially dealing with Ms. London then ended up with a joker named Mazen

This place had lied an took our money an did nothing to aid the legal situation i was in. I went to them for help on a small technical parole violation a process that would take a few weeks tops. But sadly the incompetence and lack of integrity in this office made me loss my baby daughters first birthday. They handed my case over to a man named Mazen Radaydeh who should get drug tested because he was always half asleep in my 2 hearings an looked lost 100% of the time. They never return emails never returned calls an made me loss the most precious moment in my daughter’s existence.

Kimberly can be counted on to watch out for clients.  She is watchful of their legal expenses. She has helped military veterans and her community.

One Amazing person and Lawyer..If.you want someone you can Trust and will not nickel and dime you; while is a rockstar in court use Kimberly.  In my opinion she is well respected by the courts and will bring a level of comfort to this process.  I know many lawyers and she is the right fit!!  HIGHLY RECOMMEND!!!
A man of principal and high moral and Constitutional values.
For 15 years, Davis Law Firm has been outstanding. If you are looking for Trustworthy, Knowledgeable, Experienced and excellent Communicators.

I'm not too sure.  Maybe they only answer certain people/certain situations or cases.
I initially called multiple times and didn't receive an answer for a week or so.  I was informed once they did reply, that at that time they were relocating their office and wouldn't begin taking cases again Sept. 1, 2018. I've sent two emails since then and still no response.  Posting this to possibly help others when making their decision to choose this firm.  Everything I researched about this company seemed great and the attorney himself spoke wonderful volumes and showed he definitely has the knowledge and experience, but not being able to reach anyone, or not receive a reply from phone calls made and emails sent, also speaks volumes.  I hope this review helps someone.

Experienced attorneys in multiple areas of law which helps because most legal issues overlap in some way.  This firm is hands on and allows for direct client communication with its attorneys.  Has handled my tax and family needs for years.  Highly recommend them!

This firm did a great job handling my tax audit and bankruptcy case.  Good people who worked around my schedule.  Great dealing with the other side and being aggressive when needed.  Got me what I wanted.

Amy is very responsive , experienced and will set the right expectations from day1.
She did a great job for me and I would recommend anyone to use her with any personal injury needs.

Phenomenal lawyer who handled an accident resulting in a double spinal fusion with absolute ease and professionalism and reached a settlement within 9 months. After that experience I figured she would do an absolutely amazing job with what she herself deemed a "simple whiplash" case. Well over one year later, I am still waiting on a simple update as to what is going on with my case. Not only have her communication skills greatly dropped off, her organizational skills, and confidentiality has fallen dismally short of what I had come to expect. While attempting to communicate with Amy has been more difficult than trying to get a straight answer from a 18-year old girl, she has sent me other client's police reports containing their personal information on accident, wrongly answered my emails under the assumption I was another client, and will not answer my phone calls without provocation. To add insult to injury, I was relocated by my job to another location, and upon informing Amy of the move, I was and have been given the third degree multiple times on how this made her job so much more difficult despite the fact I had ensured all PT, doctors appointments, and everything else was taken care of for her PRIOR to the move leaving only her end of paperwork. Now here we are two more weeks later, and I can't get a simple response to an email asking if everything is going ok with my case.
She sucks and is mean. If your case is complex go to her. But expect to wait and wait and wait for any feedback or anything from Amy.    STAY AWAY.   I wish I could give negative stars.
Amy is an aggressive lawyer that cares about her clients. She did a great job for us in our case and saved us a significant amount of money.

I hired Julie as my divorce attorney, her & Johnathen were amazing through the whole process. They were both quick to respond and so very helpful through the whole process. I definitely recommend hiring them if you're looking for an attorney who will get the job done right and efficiently.

I highly recommend Ms. Julie Kirkpatrick and her paralegal, Jonathan Ortega, for anyone needing representation in a custody matter. From the beginning, they have both been professional, thorough, and consistently diligent in handling my case. Communication has been clear, organized, and informative, which made the process much easier to understand.
What stood out most was their attention to detail and commitment to handling everything properly. They were responsive, well-prepared, and consistently went above and beyond compared to my previous experiences with attorneys.
I appreciate their professionalism and strong advocacy throughout my case and would confidently recommend them to others seeking knowledgeable and reliable legal representation.

Blake and his team went above and beyond anything I expected from an attorney.

What stood out most was how available, responsive, and straightforward he is. Blake actually listens. He took the time to understand what I was dealing with and what I was trying to accomplish, then gave clear, practical guidance that cut straight to the most effective path forward.

He’s sharp, strategic, and easy to talk to — no talking down, no overcomplicating things. You can tell he’s a centered, values-driven family man, and that integrity shows in how he treats his clients. I always felt confident in the direction we were taking.

If you want someone who is solid, honest, and focused on real solutions, I highly recommend Blake and his team.
Amazing assistance, quick, fast, simple.

I had a great experience from beginning to the end. Julie and Jonathen were thoughtful and considerate of my needs and emotions throughout the experience. She provided timely advice kept me out of trouble. I highly recommend Rudd Legal.

Julie Kirkpatrick demonstrated experience and confidence in the court room. I turned the case over to her firm on a Thursday and we were awarded the judgement for my client on the following Monday.
Julie and her staff made the best out of a very poor situation.
Thank you for all your work!
I know we have found a partner in Julie.
Jason Brown
Solutions Real Estate Texas
reviews.ownerResponse:
Jason,

Thank you so much for your fantastic review! We’re delighted to hear that Julie and our team were able to deliver such swift and effective results for your case. It’s great to know that Julie’s expertise and confidence in the courtroom made a significant impact, and we’re thrilled that we could turn a challenging situation into a positive outcome.
Your recognition of our efforts means a lot to us. We’re excited to continue partnering with you and providing the support you need. If you ever need anything further, please don’t hesitate to reach out. Thank you once again for your trust and kind words!

This place is amazing, after years of battling my ex for division of property. These people got it taken care of quickly and painlessly for me.  Julie , You are amazing . Thank you so much for all of your hard work😊

I would highly recommend Julie and the Rudd Legal Group team to anyone needing a strong, thoughtful, and steady advocate in a family law matter.
Julie and Johnathan led me through a difficult time and supported me throughout. Highly recommended.

They resolved the issue with the plaintiff, all at an excellent price, and most importantly, they worked in Spanish, which is always a problem with many firms. I highly recommend Julie and her assistant, Johnathen Ortega. Thank you so much 😊 for your help! ✨🙏🏻✨🙏🏻

Julie and Johnathen are simply the BEST. Communicating with me through every step, and helped with each and every question. You definitely get what you pay for, and I would highly recommend them for your legal case.
Julie was incredible to work with as my attorney.  She has great attention to detail and kept me informed every step of the way.  I would enthusiastically recommend her to anyone.  She’s the best!
Blake is the best! I've worked with him on several issues and he always knows his stuff.
Knowledgeable, quick to answer, and competent staff. Thank you for your assistance.

I can’t say enough positive things about Blake and Erin. From the beginning, they showed genuine care and attention. Blake was my attorney when he worked with another firm, and when he opened his own practice, I didn’t hesitate to follow him. His honesty, professionalism, and dedication truly set him apart. What stood out most was how personalized he made the entire process. Took  the time to understand my family’s situation, and I always felt heard and supported. Remember minor details of our family situations that he was able to pull out in court.  Even when the opposing side was difficult and not always truthful, Blake stayed calm, ethical, and focused on the facts. I believe his integrity and thoughtful approach made a real difference with the judge’s perception and the outcome. I’ve seen many attorneys dealing with this custody case on the opposing side and can say that Blake’s resilient integrity made a big difference for me personally.

Couldn’t be more bothered by a business. Sent an inquiry in on a Friday. Was reached out to via email Monday. I called shortly there after to set up consultation. I insisted it was urgent as it has to do with the safety of my son. I was told paperwork would be heading my way shortly after for a Thursday afternoon meeting with attorney. I never received paperwork. I reached out via email Tuesday morning, no response back. I called Wednesday morning, no apology…acted as if they didn’t know who I was. Said they would send paperwork over immediately. Several hours later I receive and email, not a phone call but email saying attorney was busy and suggested I try another attorney in the firm. Now I’m attorney shopping all over again because of this classless unprofessionalism. They are not worthy of so many 5 start reviews. I’m sure I dodged a bullet.

Great group of people. Called to see if they could help in a case, wasn’t something they do as a firm but they helped point me in a direction of who could. They didn’t have to but took the time when others didn’t.

Julie and Johnathen are truly amazing. From the very beginning, they treated me with kindness, patience, and professionalism during one of the hardest times in my life. Julie listened carefully and guided me with clarity, and Johnathen was always responsive and supportive with every detail. I felt safe and cared for throughout the process. I am deeply grateful for their dedication and would recommend them to anyone who needs strong and compassionate legal support.

Julie, no matter how busy she was, always made time to respond quickly, and she is not only extremely friendly but also a truly capable family law attorney. To me, during such a difficult time, she felt like a superwoman. Johnathen was calm, understanding, and always listened to me with patience, making sure all the paperwork was handled professionally and smoothly. They are such a professional, kind, and sweet team that always wish my best outcomes. I will always be thankful for everything they have done for me! Thank you Julie and Johnathen!!!♥️

Blake and his team were amazing during my divorce process.  They were there every step of the way and communicated perfectly!  Gave great advice as well!  They truly made a rough time in my life a calm and peaceful experience.

I had the pleasure of working with Jennifer and Caitlen while going through the process of filing for divorce. These two lovely ladies made this experience the least stressful it could be, all while being so kind and professional. If you’re looking for a team that can help make your life easier, this is definitely where you should be looking! I will definitely be recommending them to anyone that needs a good lawyer.

I can’t say enough good things about Blake Rudd and his paralegal, Erin. From the very beginning, they guided me through my divorce and custody case with kindness, patience, and dedication. My case was extremely sensitive, involving my 3-year-old daughter and an abusive ex-husband struggling with addiction. Blake handled it with the perfect balance of compassion and strength, never backing down when it came to protecting my rights and my child’s best interests.

My ex’s law firm was known for overbilling and filing unnecessary motions, but Blake stopped those in their tracks, saving me time, money, and stress. He kept the focus on what truly mattered. Both Blake and Erin were incredibly responsive  whether it was a late-night email or a panicked question, they always replied quickly and thoughtfully. They made sure I understood every step, which gave me so much peace of mind during one of the hardest times in my life.

Thanks to their hard work and dedication, I came out of this process with what I needed for my daughter and myself. I will always be grateful for the way they handled my case and supported me every step of the way. Thank you so much to both of you, Blake and Erin, I’ll be singing your praises to anyone I can!
Julie and Johnathen were amazing to work with throughout the entire process. Highly recommend them if you are in need.

10/10 Highly Recommend!! After dealing with a previous attorney who left my case in disarray and a non-responsive ex-spouse dragging his feet at every turn, Jennifer stepped in and brought order to chaos. She quickly assessed the mess, developed a clear plan, and executed it with precision, professionalism, and just the right amount of edge - and w/in 7 days had received a response from an ex who had been unresponsive for months on debts owed and non compliant with our divorce decree.

She didn’t waste time or energy on his manipulative back and forth tactics, she got things done, protected my interests, and handled enforcement when needed. I genuinely appreciated her firm yet efficient approach.

If you're navigating a difficult divorce, especially with an uncooperative ex-spouse, do yourself a favor and start with her. I wish I had! Thank you, Jennifer and Team!
Thank you for your guidance navigating this issue.  Julie was knowledgeable and had me and my children’s best interest in mind during this process.

I had a great experience working with Jennifer Arnold on my estate planning. She was concise, thorough, highly knowledgeable, and met every commitment on time. The entire process was handled professionally and efficiently, and I felt well informed and supported throughout. I highly recommend anyone looking for dependable and expert estate planning legal services see Jennifer Arnold and her team.

They are certainly not cheap, but I could not be happier with the results of my case.  Julie and her paralegal (Jonathan) were extremely responsive and diligent every step of the way. In the end, Julie was able to get me a custody schedule with my sons I felt was in their best interest and her strategy was spot on in beating my ex’s false common marriage claim. You’re in good hands with Julie and her team.

When I started my divorce I consulted with several attorneys to ask questions about their process and to see how they would support. Blake was my 3 meeting and I knew when I left that he was the best fit. He provided advice and guidance throughout the consult as I shared my notes and asked questions.
Both him and Erin had great attention to detail, prompt replies to email and phone calls, and I always knew what steps were coming next. They were also transparent about costs and I was always aware of billing.
This team truly cares about their clients and are experts at navigating the process. Thank you for all you do.

My attorney Jennifer Arnold and her team made my divorce process swift and smooth. I was informed in great detail throughout the entire process. I received responses within MINUTES! I'm very happy with the service provided. I highly recommend this law firm.

From start to finish Ms. Arnold and team were professional and responded in a timely fashion. They were a great group to help me through a difficult and stressful process. Ms. Arnold was very helpful in guiding me through the process.
Julie and her paralegal were there for me every step of the way. I can't recommend them highly enough
Blake Rudd and his paralegal did an amazing job during my difficult divorce. He is very attention to detail and his communication during the process was too notch. I definitely recommend him!

Retained this attorney (Julie) with high hopes, but the experience was deeply disappointing. The retainer was exhausted rapidly with little transparency or meaningful progress—no discovery filed, and trial preparation was minimal at best. The attorney appeared disorganized and lacked courtroom presence. In contrast, the paralegal (Johnathan) showed more diligence and professionalism than the attorney ever did. I would not recommend this firm for serious litigation.

Julie is a great lawyer. She took the time to thoroughly review my case and made sure my children were well prepared to take the stand. She was also proactive in preparing for different outcomes, including the possibility of things not going in my favor. Julie is very responsive, and she always takes the time to clearly explain her arguments and reasoning.

Her paralegal, Johnathen, was also incredibly helpful and supportive throughout the process. Together, they make a strong and reliable team that I feel confident working with. I truly appreciate their dedication and professionalism.

Julie Kirkpatrick I cant thank you enough for helping with the adoption of my daughter. The process was smooth and simple and you explained everything to me in terms I could understand. Thank you so much for making an impact on my family. I appreciate you so much!!!! Thanks again!!

Jennifer, Erin, and Blake helped me out through the whole process and were very professional and always quick in responding to my emails and phone calls. I never had to wait for a reply; they always responded before the end of the next business day and most often within a couple hours of reaching out. I would definitely recommend this firm to anyone going through a divorce as they made the legal part as simple and smooth as possible in an otherwise tumultuous part of my life.

There really are not words to express how amazing Julie and Johnathan were during the most difficult time of my life. When I first met them, I was completely clueless about the divorce process. Never once did they make me feel rushed to make a decision, and always took their time explaining things to me in terms that I could understand. They were very patient with me in any changes that needed to be made, and were always willing to work with my odd work hours. My ex is somewhat difficult; Julie and Johnathan ALWAYS had my back. I called her my little bulldog, his lawyer was no match for this team. They truly were a godsend. I always felt like I was meeting with old friends. I recommend this team 10 out of 10!

Mr Rudd and Erin Fisher was very helpful in my case, they stayed on top of every thing.
Always on time with correspondence by email or phone,

Very satisfied with there services.

Thanks again Mr Blake Rudd and Erin Fisher.

reviews.text: I spoke to this man once, and not even a full sentence out of my mouth and he started being rude. He asked me to explain the situation, and anytime i tried to he cut me off instead of letting me explain. I don't know how one manages to stay in business while being a p o s. Literally better off employing a blind rat than this manner-less dolt.
I would trust a literal trash can with my legal concerns before I trusted this guy
Brad helped me resolve an issue with the manufacturer of an electric vehicle. Brad was great to work with and I would recommend him to anyone that in a similar situation. Thanks, Brad.
I am very pleased with the Riffe Law Firm. They were very professional.

My wife and I have known Brad Rife for approximately one year, when we first contacted him to seek legal assistance regarding serious issues with our vehicle and the manufacturer. From the very beginning, Brad was professional, responsive, and completely transparent about the entire process. He immediately explained the steps involved, what documentation we would need to provide, and how the case would proceed. He also clearly explained that his legal fees would not come out of our settlement, but would instead be paid separately by the automobile manufacturer — which immediately put us at ease.

We provided Brad with all of our service records, repair history, photographs, and documentation of the repeated problems we experienced with our vehicle. He promptly notified the manufacturer of the ongoing defects and our demand to be compensated for our loss and to return the vehicle. Throughout what is naturally a time-consuming process, Brad stayed fully engaged, communicative, and proactive.

When the time came for the manufacturer to inspect our vehicle, Brad guided us through that step as well. After we experienced delays and a lack of response from the dealership, Brad did not hesitate to take the next necessary step and filed a lawsuit to move the case forward. Because the manufacturer operates under European business timelines, the process had additional challenges; however, Brad remained persistent and focused. Ultimately, he negotiated an offer that was acceptable to us. He kept us informed of where the negotiations stood, discussed the settlement range with us, and once we communicated where we would be comfortable, he resolved the matter within just a couple of weeks.

In short, Brad Rife is an outstanding attorney when it comes to dealing with automobile manufacturers and complex vehicle disputes. He is knowledgeable, persistent, and truly works on behalf of his clients. He stays on top of the case, handles matters efficiently, and ensures that his clients receive the full settlement amount, without reductions for attorney fees. The settlement we received was 100% of the agreed amount, exactly as promised.

We strongly recommend Brad Rife to anyone experiencing serious automobile issues that go beyond the dealership level and require action against a manufacturer. If you are frustrated and feel like you are getting nowhere, call Brad — he will help you. We are truly grateful for everything he did for us.

Mr Brad Riffe, was absolutely on the ball. I can only thank him for all his efforts from start to finish. Just be patient as the quality work does take time. My case involved handicapped modifications malfunctioning on my brand new van. The outcome was reasonable, thanks to Mr. Riffe.

I reached out to Brad due to transmission issues I was having with my new truck. He responded very quickly and was able to help me get some of my money back for the vehicle. I highly recommend you contact him if you are having problems with your vehicle and took to a shop 4 times or more for the same problem after getting worked on.

Brad was very knowledgeable about the lemon law process and guided me through my situation with my Wagoneer. These cases naturally take time, but he kept me updated along the way and made everything simple to execute and easy to understand. I appreciated his expertise in navigating the complexities of the case, and in the end he was able to bring it to a successful outcome. I’d recommend him to anyone needing help with lemon law issues.

I hired Attorney Brad Riffe to handle a lemon law claim against Hyundai. Early on, he admitted that Hyundai cases are “very difficult” and told me that if it had been Ford, we would have had an offer on the table already. Despite knowing the low chances of success, he took my money and provided minimal support throughout the process. Communication was poor, and I felt neglected. When I requested a refund of unearned fees, he accused me of extortion. I have filed a formal grievance with the Texas Bar. I cannot recommend his services and advise caution if you’re considering hiring him.
“Texas attorney,” “lemon law,” “Hyundai case."
reviews.ownerResponse: I am sorry you had a negative experience. However, a) you did not hire me, your husband did; b) I never made any such statement regarding timelines; c) I obtained an offer for a repurchase within two months but the negative equity was too high; d) your husband opted to settle the case for cash; e) the manufacturer paid our attorney fees, not you; f) this was over a year and a half ago; and g) you have already attempted to extort money from our firm.

reviews.ownerResponse: No one 'hoodwinked" you and all these positive reviews that you see are real. I cannot get into specifics regarding any client, but I provide the same services for all my parole clients: guidance on Support and Self-Support Letters; travel to meet personally with my client at their unit; creation of a parole packet; travel to the Regional Parole Board for an in-person hearing, with family members present. Regarding questions asked at the hearing, I send those family members that will attend the hearing the questions that will I ask them, not questions the Board will ask. I have no control over what the Board asks. It is not true that a G5 status inmate is "automatically denied." If an inmate's parole review is delayed due to lowered status because of rules violations, once that inmate regains eligible status, they will be reviewed. There may be a delay in review, but there is no "automatic denial," that is simply not true. Regarding my familiarity of any inmate's "cases," and knowing they would result in a denial, I do not have access to those details until after I am retained. Access to that information requires a release signed by the inmate. Many clients have TDCJ cases and are still approved, it depends on the severity and nature of the case, as well as any extenuating circumstances. For any inmate, the outcome of a Parole Review is highly dependent on an inmate's conviction and criminal history, their behavior within TDCJ (good and  bad behavior), as well as previous parole or probation violations. To a lesser extent, the likelihood of a negative vote per the voting history of the Lead Voter on a review. Those factors are beyond my control to change, but I can provide additional information that may mitigate how negatively the Board regards them. What I offer is the opportunity to advocate more directly to the Board than what typically occurs during a parole review, providing more positive information regarding my client. But there is no guarantee of outcome regarding any legal representation. I regret that you are unsatisfied with the outcome regarding my representation of your grandson, but I fulfilled every aspect of the parole representation agreement that you contracted for. Best of luck going forward.

reviews.text: I have been involved in many hundreds of real estate closings, but never experienced anywhere near the incompetence that I experienced with Ashley Mace, Rachel Shelton and Brittany Norton (and Amanda Escobar, Senior Claims Counsel with Fidelity National Financial ).   My experience was so bad that I filed a complaint with the Texas Department of Insurance and plan to sue Lawyers Title Company for a refund of all fees that I paid to them but that they did not earn.

I feel for you if you ever have the misfortune of dealing with Ashley Mace or Rachel Shelton. Both are incredibly incompetent and do not care about their customers whatsoever. Together, they might manage to tank a $850,000 home sale. We were given nothing but ineptitude and condescension from them from start to finish.

They provided incorrect information after incorrect information, something that we had to correct on our end, and instead of apologizing and diffusing a situation, they doubled down and made the situation 10 times worse.

I cannot understand why any realtor would ever choose Lawyer's Title as their title company. They are highly unprofessional and treat you like scum. Out of all of the real estate transactions I've done in the past, I've never not received my funds the same day. Lawyer's Title likes to go against the status quo and make you wonder if you'll ever receive your money. They don't care to ever update you at any point during the process. Their notary singing agents tell you you'll be funded by 4:00 pm the same day, all the while nothing could be further from the truth.

They are flippant and could care less about doing a good job. If you call them out on something they said that was incorrect, they'll simply ignore your email. Rachel Shelton actually had the audacity to call my email "abusive." Having a victim mentality when a customer wants to know where their $300,000 is is not a good look for a company.

I've never been so infuriated dealing with a company. If you're a realtor, please do not put your buyer or seller through the massive headache of having to deal with this company. The way their agents conduct themselves and the incorrect information they give to customers is unacceptable at best. We will be filing a report against this company on our experience. Oh, and we still have not received any of our funds for the sale of our home. It's maddening knowing such incompetent, rude people are in charge of all your money. For all we know, we'll never get the funds!

Update 3/7/24: We thought our nightmare with this incompetent company was finally over, but it certainly is not. Their employees are so inept that they sent our pool payoff loan to our own PO Box! This is now causing a delay to the closing of our next home! This is negligence at its finest. I had to leave work early to rush to the post office in pouring down rain to overnight the check to the correct address at my expense.

I reached out to their corporate office about the never ending problems with their incompetent employees but have yet to hear back. I will now be suing them if they do not reimburse me for the overnight shipping charges I incurred and any delay in my next closing caused by this massive blunder. This is truly unbelievable that a company could make this many egregious mistakes, and we absolutely believe this was an intentional act to cause more stress and delays for us.

From the mortgage lender point of view as well, they were very easy to get final documents balanced and obtain the necessary information for a loan to close. I'd recommend anyone looking to sell their home or refinance their current mortgage use Rachel and Sydney at Lawyer's Title in Frisco.

reviews.text: Sellers beware. I recently sold my grandmother’s home as an investment property. This company refused to calculate my portion of property taxes with the appropriate exemptions and ceilings (my grandmother passed early this year). Instead, I postponed closing and had the buyer call DCAD to confirm what I would owe. It worked out in the end only because I required the buyer write in the appropriate tax amount. I would otherwise have been out nearly 4K. The worst part was when the title officer looked me dead in the eye and told me she also called DCAD and I was wrong about exemptions and ceilings remaining. Taxes came out this month. I was right. Complete lack of due diligence on the part of this company. Recovery of my money, had I relied on the title officer’s calculation, would have required litigation and been nearly impossible.

reviews.text:
DON’T USE THEM!!!!
Where do I even begin?
I wired funds over a day before closing because my closing was first thing in the morning. I had to follow up to see if they got the funds!

After signing my docs I asked for copies to be emailed to me. I closed on 3/31 and got the docs 4/19, and again I had to follow up!

Finally, our warranty deed was recorded in error under my name as well as some random stranger! They are going back to fix it with the county, but not so much as an apology for their sloppy work. In one sentence or less this office seems like a hot mess.

I’ve been a part of five different closings in Frisco alone, and I’ve never had to be this proactive. Title companies are a dime a dozen. You’re seriously better off anywhere else.

I recently had the chance to work with Jackie Andras and her team at Lawyers Title Frisco. They were a pleasure to work with, staying on top of communication and the process every step of the way.  I really appreciated all they did to create such a smooth transaction.

Moving is always a challenge. It's emotionally, physically, and mentally draining. My family and I have moved several times in the past few years, but this time was different. We were moving out of state to a completely new and unfamiliar locale. It was intimidating to say the least.

To put it lightly, buying a home in Texas sight-unseen from Southern California during this time was an emotional rollercoaster. At several points along the journey we believed that it just wasn't meant to be and we wouldn't luck out and win a bid on a house we liked. But we persisted and did luck out eventually. We scored a home that ticked most of the right boxes for us and were/are ecstatic about it!

Then, of course, came the closing process, which was completely new territory for my wife and I as first-time homebuyers. But this is also where Jackie Andras and her amazing team at Lawyers Title came in to save us from tons of unnecessary stress and worry.

I can't really put into words how wonderful it was working with Jackie and her team. She was like the glorious white puffy cloud surrounded by rays of sunshine in the eye of a category 5 hurricane. Her and her team were always patient and understanding, which is great because I am very detail-oriented and like to know about every process that I am involved with. But regardless of how busy she was (and I knew very well that she was/is inundated with work as a result of the current market conditions) she always took ample time to answer all of my questions, ease my anxiety, and inspire confidence in me that everything would be just fine and that I don't need to stress because her and her team would ensure that every single "i" was dotted and "t" was crossed.

All this being said about Jackie and her team's exemplary professional qualities, it was her genuine human empathy and sympathy that won me over. We would have conversations that started out very "on-script", covering topics related to the closing process. But she is so pleasant to speak with that our conversations would often veer off into discussions about general life topics. This may not be important to all people, but for me it is an amazing, and often overlooked quality in a service professional. It conveyed to me that I am interacting with a real person that is sincere and truly cares about me and my family's well-being.

Buying our home was probably the most important and costly financial transaction of our lives so entrusting the process to someone who cares made me feel at peace with the process and gave me the confidence that everything would be done right and nothing would be overlooked. I felt this because I could tell that Jackie invests in her client's happiness and satisfaction, and is dedicated to fulfilling her responsibilities to the best of her abilities.

I can honestly say that over the closing process and throughout my interactions with Jackie that we became friends, at least that's how I view our relationship. Her and her team got the job done and got it done with a level of precision and efficiency that I have rarely experienced in my years as an adult (and I ain't no spring chicken). Without a doubt, I would recommend Jackie and her team at Lawyers Title to anyone and everyone looking for a title company for any real estate transaction.

Thank you so so much Jackie and thank you to all the members of Jackie's team!

Christine McLean, Rachel Shelton, and their team at Lawyers Title are exceptional! I am a huge fan! They're experienced, super knowledgeable, extremely professional, and always ensure smooth and seamless transactions! They always take care of my sellers and clients! I highly recommend them if you're looking for a great title company! And their office is located at The Star and is so beautiful!

This review is directly toward Lawyers Title  Kelly Berry.  I purchased a home in the Frisco area in July 2021.  The Seller's agent had retained the service with this company.  At the time of the closing, the property tax they estimated was based on the previous year.  The actual property tax for the year of 2021 is higher and therefore the Seller is supposed to pay an additional of $250. I initially emailed Kelly Berry's office and there was no response.  I then called them on 11/04/2021 and the office worker said she will ask her boss, Kelly Berry, as to what they can do.  On 11/05/2021, Kelly Berry emailed me back.  In the email, she stated that they can't " brokering any settlement between you and the seller post closing" and she can't release any contact information of the Seller.   She then pointed out that the paper I signed which holds them harmless if the the actual tax rate comes out to be different then the estimated tax rate.

During July of 2021, I had also purchased other homes in the area with the help of other escrow services such as First American and Tiago.  With other properties, I also had the same issue.  I contacted First American and Tiago, they were very happy to reach out the Sellers for me without any problems.  They don't guarantee if the sellers will actually pay up, but as a customer, I certainly appreciated the help.  I definitely would not recommend this escrow company to anyone. This particular place is about protecting themselves and has no regard for the customers.
I had horrible experience with this company and their service. No attention to detail.
Excellent service to all of my clients. Extremely professional with the best response time. The best title company in the metroplex!
The Best Title company that i have worked with.Exceptional customer service .Highly recommend Kelly Berry as escrow officer . She is very knowledgeable and responsible.

Lawyers Title in Frisco has terrible service over the phone I would never recommend this place, closed a transaction here many years ago, called to get a copy of a document for a repeat client in Frisco and they gave me the BS run around for a WEEK ....  Stay away 👎👎👎👎
Kelly, Whitney and Jason are a top notch team. Always taking great care of my clients!
Kelly Berry and her team are the absolute best!! We have done numerous transactions with them and NEVER had an issue. You’re in great hands with this team!

Lawyer’s title was chosen by the buyer’s agent for closing on my house sale and my agent and I were not pleased with how this transaction was handled. She was in touch with them constantly the week before closing to make sure everything was in order for a time of closing. Closing was scheduled on Monday and on Friday she requested the closing statement which she did not receive. She called again on Monday and was told that they did not have all the documents in order for closing that day. I had taken off work which is very inconvenient not be told that they didn’t have the documents in order on time. We ultimately received the  Final closing statement 14 minutes before our scheduled closing appointment which did not give us time to review it. Access to their office is atrocious. They are located in the Cowboys complex, which beautiful but is locked down by key card access and requires escort. We received no information regarding parking and access to the building ahead of our appointment. I first parked in the parking garage and discovered you need a key card to get into the building. I had to call their office to get instructions for where to go to access the building. Then, once in the building we were accosted by security because apparently you aren’t allowed anywhere in the building without an escort, even in the lobby. Would have been nice if Lawyer’s Title A) gave us a heads up about that and B) had someone to meet us to escort us, ESPECIALLY since I had JUST CALLED and they knew I was on the premesis trying to locate their office. Additionally, after closing, we got trapped on the elevator because no one escorted us down and you need a KEYCARD TO LEAVE!!! So we had to use the call button to call someone for help to get to the ground floor to leave the building! And as a final goodbye, I had a GIANT orange warning sticker on my car, because the location Lawyer’s title told me to park in was only one hour parking. I arrived at 5:28pm and got back to my car at 6:19 pm, a grand total of 51 minutes. But the giant orange warning sticker warned me that I had been there over and hour. I won’t be using them again when I buy my next house. Location is beautiful but not worth the hassle.

I've closed consistently at this lawyers title location for the past three years. From my end they have always been flawless. I know everyone will receive the best service from my sellers/buyers, the other agent on the transaction, their clients and the lenders. No matter how complicated or simple the transaction, Kelly Berry and her team simply hit it out of the park with each and every interaction.

I had a very disappointing experience with Scott, Ray, Pemberton & Goll, PLLC. I initially contacted Aarya Chipalkatti from the firm on May 21st to schedule a consultation as a MetLife customer. Two appointments were set—one for May 28th and another for June 13th, 2025.

However, I was never informed ahead of time that the firm no longer supports MetLife customers. After taking the time to schedule and prepare for these meetings, I was ultimately denied the opportunity to speak with an attorney. When I asked why this important detail wasn’t communicated earlier, the lady on the call responded dismissively and without courtesy. Most shockingly, when I mentioned leaving a review, I was told, “They don’t care for Google reviews.”

This lack of transparency, professionalism, and respect for a potential client’s time and concerns is extremely disappointing. I hope the firm reconsiders how it communicates with people seeking legal support.

This is exactly what Ms. Woelfel does. She offers so much more than good lawyering - although there is certainly that. She is so aware of her clients' ancillary needs revolving around divorce and family structure. And, she takes steps to make sure her clients are well cared for in every area.

I love that, not only does the legal community have such an outstanding professional in their ranks but, the entire community has such a great person in its citizenry. Elisse Woelfel makes everything she touches better.

To start I want to thank Elisse for everything she did for me throughout one of the most stressful processes in my life. I had a wonderful experience working with Elisse. Not only did she give me the professional advice she was there as a person to listen and genuinely give the best expert advice. Elisse is responsive and has a great sense of urgency with communication. I cannot say how grateful I am to Elisse for going the extra mile to get me the best outcome possible and continuing support. The process was extended due to the other parties inconsistent behaviors and the hiring of an Accident lawyer and not a Family lawyer but Elisse was there step by step patienlty and professionaly and knowing she is on my side made a huge impact to the process. Elisse had an extensive amount of added work to do because of the other party not having a proper lawyer representation but Elisse did it all no problem and made a stressful situation a breeze. No words can truly express the gratitude and respect that I have towards Elisse. It's helps me a great deal towards getting some of the issues I had from my past corrected. The relief of that burden is un-describable. Elisse made it possible with her hard work, diligence, passion, and enthusiasm.
Based on Elisse's suggestions, we worked with my oldest child's mother to forgive part of the back child support and reduce my payments based on my current income. Plus, were able to agree to a reasonable amount to pay on the remaining back support amount.
I fully trust her knowledge and experience in the law. It was easy to be completely honest with her while we worked my case and I have NEVER been more comfortable speaking with an attorney at that level.
She will listen to your questions, take thought and ideas then she tell what can be done, and what can't. She will even break down each of the "can be done" options into degree of difficulty. Then suggest a plan of action to work towards.

If you wish to hire Elisse to represent you, can't go wrong if you are open and honest. Thank you Elisse! You helped make my life and my family's lives better!

Divorce has been finalized for 6 months but the paralegal just kept using the money until they almost ran out. $3500 for nothing but a waste. My daughter is getting a refund of $135 for that office to do nothing but give her the run around. Never heard from the attorney the whole time it was going on. We were influenced by reviews and therefore wanted to add ours here to help those of you searching to make a better decision than we did.  Our case had to do with obtaining managing conservatorship over our grandchildren after a tragic car accident killed our daughter.  We tried to handle the legal filings ourselves through the court, but the judge advised us to get a lawyer to better handle the complexities.  We searched online and selected this law firm mainly due to its dealings with the designated courthouse and reviews.  Once we met with the attorney, he said all the right things that made us feel like the case would have the urgency that we felt.   We signed the paperwork and sent in our retainer so we could get started right away.  From that point on it was a nightmare.  Specifically, the issues consisted of little to no communication unless we initiated it, egregious mistakes on paperwork, unprofessionalism and no urgency.  Once we realized this, we decided it was not working and fired them.  We even sent the lawyer a list of constructive criticism based on our experience to help them with future clients.  He completely dismissed it and even said that was not the way he saw things. In fact, after obtaining zero results on our case this firm charged us almost the entire retainer!  Yes, that’s right and in hindsight it really felt like they only wanted to bill every penny they could instead of focusing on completing the case.  We are grandparents just trying to do the right thing for our grandkids and feel taken advantage of.  This is why we wanted to get our experience out there as a warning to those of you searching for a firm to handle your case.  We made a terrible choice here and don’t want you to do the same.  We have retained a new firm and could not be happier as the experience has been a night and day difference.  I only wish we would have started there and not had to go through this nightmare and complete waste of money and time.
Very caring and knowledgeable staff. I would highly recommend this law firm.
Horrible attorney, ex cop who wants to be a lawyer now. Has a horrible attitude, acts like he can win cases and he can’t. Don’t waste your money. Only wants that your money

Divorce and child custody issues is not an easy process, but Sharita and Desiree are hidden gems in the DFW metroplex. Sharita’s pleasant demeanor and candor is something I valued from my initial consultations.

Pricing and policies during the initial intake process sets expectations from the beginning for the lawyer and client relationship. The firm accommodates remote and virtual meetings which is an efficient use of time and resources.

Desiree responds timely to any concerns you bring up. I have admired in Desiree her honesty and support. She always presents you with options (if available) and empowers the client to make the decision that is in their best interest. Never once have I felt obligated to do something because “my lawyer told me so.” Rather she discusses even difficult subjects with respect and openness.

Desiree is thorough and detail oriented. She is not last minute when preparing for cases that may go to trial. What I have valued is that I was not just her client but truly appreciative of the open collaboration. Finally, Desiree is respectful both “on and off the field”- in front of the judge, when interacting with opposing counsel(s), and all parties involved. reviews.text:
As a Turkish citizen who has lived in the USA for many years, I believe that the legal struggles of immigrants, regardless of the type of case, are:

Their future, their destiny... I met CK Law Office through a friend's recommendation. Attorney Asim Bey, with his tone of voice and style, perfectly reflects the sense of trust that perhaps every applicant first expects.
First of all, Asim Bey and the other colleagues never lacked the courtesy we needed in our Green Card application based on marriage. They were patiently by our side. They followed the process with great seriousness.
I owe them a debt of gratitude. I definitely recommend them.
I wish everyone ease in their work...good luck.

Selcuk Fidanli
Thank you for everything, and I especially appreciate your attention to detail, attention to technical aspects, and most importantly, your accessibility.

I would like to express my sincere gratitude to my lawyer, Mr. Asım, his partner, and his staff. I previously worked with another lawyer and was unsuccessful; I couldn't find them in their office, and they didn't answer the phone. Therefore, on behalf of my wife, son, and myself, I am very pleased with our current lawyer, Mr. Asım. We discuss and consult on every matter. I wholeheartedly recommend him to you all. Thank you, ÇELİKSOY, thank you, KILINÇ.

Working with Mr Asim and his team on our green card process was a smooth experience. They maintained a professional demeanor and ensured that we had the necessary information at each stage. We appreciated their assistance throughout the process

The law firm we previously worked with was quite well-known and reputable. However, this process, fraught with great anxiety and uncertainty, which we were experiencing for the first time in our lives, seemed like an ordinary case to them. Unfortunately, they did not share our concerns, and our case was not handled with the necessary care.

When we met our esteemed attorneys, Asım and Ergül, we saw the difference clearly. Their approach went beyond a mere professional commitment; it was one that touched people, inspired trust, and truly embraced the case. We realized once again what a privilege it is to work with competent lawyers during a long and challenging process like immigration.

Moreover, it's not just Asım and Ergül; they have an entire team working meticulously, unobtrusively and without a shadow of a doubt. Their prioritization of the case over financial concerns, their constant availability, and, most importantly, their ability to keep us informed and address our concerns at every step, made us feel safe.

Working with such a team is definitely a step ahead. We are grateful to them and wholeheartedly recommend them.

In just two months, no joke, they approved my asylum application, and it was from the Aslyum office. As of today, my work permit will be at my address within two weeks. I can't describe how happy I am :) I would like to thank Mr. Nurullah, Mr. Asim, and Mr. Ergul first. Try it and see the results ;)

My experience with CK Law Firm was truly wonderful. They were incredibly professional, attentive, and supportive from the very beginning. A process that would normally take years was completed in just a few months, and my case was approved in just three months. I was able to reach them easily whenever I called, and they patiently answered my questions and kept me informed every step of the way. They made me feel confident. I am so grateful for their dedication and success. I highly recommend them to anyone looking for a reliable and successful immigration attorney.

I met Mr. Ergül through a friend's recommendation. Following that, we had meetings regarding our EB-2 NIW case. From our very first meeting, he understood my approach and created my business plan accordingly. As a result, our case was successfully approved. During this process, Mr. Ergül sometimes responded to my messages immediately, and sometimes after a day or two, but this was due to his busy schedule, not because he didn't care about you or your case. He is a good lawyer who takes his work seriously and acts ethically. I referred four friends to him, and he only accepted one of their cases. One of my friends, whom he said didn't meet the requirements, hired another lawyer for a higher price, but Mr. Ergül's prediction came true, and his case was not approved. For all these reasons, I can say that Mr. Ergül has high ethical values ​​and, in my opinion, is a trustworthy lawyer. He doesn't take on cases he doesn't believe in and doesn't waste your time.

I had a wonderful experience with Ergul Celiksoy during my Extraordinary Ability (EB) Visa application. Mr. Celiksoy understood my goals very well, adapted a great strategy, and he did a really good job. The resulting work secured approval in record time. We maintained frequent communication throughout the process, and he took the time to clarify any unclear issues. I highly recommend Ergul Celiksoy to anyone seeking legal assistance with immigration matters.
They were very helpful. They answered all my questions in detail. I am very satisfied. Thank you very much for everything.
They are the best quick and easy process thanks to my lawyer

reviews.text: I contacted Thompson Law last year for a car injury and up until now they have yet to get an offer and even get a bill reduction for medical. I was speaking with Johnny for months then all of sudden I was switched to a lady named Becky who rarely calls me back and when she has contacted me she is asking me for information that was provided a YEAR AGO‼️ On last Tuesday she told me that my attorney fees would be 40% but when I looked at the agreement it stated that my case was transferred to another law group named Rolle Eaton and boy their reviews are horrible and I will not be doing any business with this law group Period especially when the agreement states 66.7% in fees WTH. This has been long overdue and now I have to start with another law group as if I never reached out to an attorney. Do better Thompson Law by your clients!
reviews.ownerResponse:
Kaleena,
We understand how frustrating this process can feel, and we want to clarify a few important points, so you have the full picture.
First, regarding attorney fees: your fee will not exceed the original agreement with Thompson Law. The percentage you saw in the other agreement reflects the internal fee split between two firms, not an increase in what you pay. Becky explained this during your recent conversation, and we’re happy to go over the details again to put your mind at ease.
Most personal injury cases take 9–12 months to resolve, but when an insurance company refuses to offer a fair settlement, things can take longer especially once litigation becomes necessary. This isn’t because your case is starting over; litigation is the next step when we’re forced to push harder for what you deserve. It’s part of fighting for the best possible outcome, and while it can feel like extra time, it often means we’re holding the insurance company accountable rather than letting them lowball you.
We also completely understand that online reviews can be concerning, but they don’t always tell the whole story. We only refer cases to firms that have proven credibility and a strong track record in handling litigation for clients like you. When a case requires certain resources or legal strategies that extend beyond our scope, partnering with a litigation firm ensures your case gets the attention and experience it needs without you paying more.
We know this has been a long journey, and we truly appreciate your patience as we work to secure the best possible result for you. Our goal has always been, and continues to be, doing right by our clients even when the process is tough and the insurance companies make it harder than it needs to be. If you have any other questions or need us to walk through any part of the process again, please don’t hesitate to reach out. We’re here for you, every step of the way.
Best,
Zack Thompson, CEO

Derek,
Thank you so much for the review. Appreciate you!

The team at HKH, led by the most professional and caring family attorney we could have every wished for, Alyssa Herrington, literally carried us through this very difficult situation. At times it seemed like this legal matter would never end, and Alyssa and her team advised and counseled my wife and I all the way through to the most ideal outcome we could have ever imagined. Our grandson has been placed with us as his sole managing conservators, he is part of a big family that loves him so much, he is a thriving rowdy almost 3 year old little boy, and most importantly, he is very much connected to his mother and father.

Alyssa, Caitlin, Rachel, and Hastings... Thank you so much for your dedication to our case, your understanding to my wife and I because I know we drove you crazy at times, the guidance and counseling for 2+ years to do the right things that were so hard to do, but kept us on track to for best outcome for our grandson.

You will hear from us every May 15th!

Rick S.

reviews.text:
When I take the time to write a review its means my expectations have been met or exceeded.
In the case of the law firm of Hanshaw Kennedy Hafen , LPP I would say they were exceeded which I will explain why later.  Jodie was my first contact who answered several important questions to my full satisfaction  and then arranged a consultation with the correct attorney.  Alyssa was the attorney who I explained why the changes to my existing trust were required in my opinion. After listening she then offered options on how we could accomplish the end goal so we began to move forward.
Why I say my my expectations were exceeded  is I reside in Europe and was only returning to the states for a limited time.  That being said almost everything had to be completed before I boarded my flight and the one document required to be able to complete the revisions to trust would not be available until near the end of my trip, a very tricky time frame to manage and it was managed perfectly. Yes perfectly and beyond my expectations because I dropped off the last document needed and I was given a draft copy for review and I realized that I would like to add a few additions and emailed in three emails during the evening.  When I arrived to sign the trust the following day and have the notary stamp the trust everything was perfect.
You can feel you have the one of the best if not the best when you hire Hanshaw Kennedy Hafen, LPP
Joseph G,
Malaga, Spain

reviews.text: Was honestly really disappointed when I met with this firm. They charge a pretty hefty consultation fee that no other law firms are charging. But they seemed legit so I paid it anyway. I’m a businessman who constantly has a variety of cases or just need legal advice often. I came to them with a bunch of different things I needed handled and they stuck me with two younger gentlemen who honestly didn’t seem like they knew what they were doing or talking about. Then they came back wanted to charge a $10,000 retainer for every single case. Even ones that needed a simple demand letter sent out. Not sure why we couldn’t do one $10,000 retainer and then continue to pay into that as it runs out like every other attorney. I think that they might be good attorneys but I wouldn’t know because I never got that far. I just felt like I got ripped off because I paid the consultation fee of several hundred dollars and then they gave me some insane price to basically tell me they didn’t want my business and then don’t refund the consultation fee. I’m sorry but I’m not giving a $50,000+ retainer. That is insane. I would highly suggest talking to other attorneys before paying them for a consultation with some of their associates.
reviews.ownerResponse:

reviews.text:
*Update: Moved from a 1 star to a 2 star review because Collin Kennedy (partner of firm) called and apologized for the issue listed below. He also offered to refund my consultation fee, which I declined. Many business owners would not admit that their associate made such an error so I commend him reaching out.

I paid $300 for a 1 hr consultation with Daniel Gonzalez. After meeting for 40 min Mr. Gonzalez stated he would contact me regarding putting a $5,000 to $10,000 retainer to cover any work expenses, which I was agreeable to. The situation was that I have a contractor not fulfilling their contract to remodel my home (has been 8 months) and Mr. Gonzalez stated he believed the contract to potentially be in default.  I was not looking to sue but to hire this firm to send a termination letter and handle any issues regarding the contractors pushback. After waiting 11 business days I had not heard back from Mr. Gonzalez. I reached out to get a response of I have been busy at work with paying clients. ? He never called me for a retainer and I was willing to pay the retainer to hire his firm. He stated the time frames were normal for this current period of construction. I don't agree with his advice but that's alright. My issue is the fact that there was no follow-up and would not have been follow-up if I had not called. Totally unprofessional to not make a phone call or email stating it wasnt worth pursuing. What would that have taken, maybe a minute? To dismiss it as being too busy to respond and that I wasn't "a paying client" is just a cheap excuse for him not doing his job. It was worth the $300 to learn that this attorney drops the ball and doesn't handle his potential client with professionalism. If a law firm hires this type of attorney it speaks volumes of the firm as well. The saddest part is Mr. Gonzalez actually tried to justify his lack of follow-up and unprofessional lack of response and believed he was in the right. Poor service and poor attitude.
reviews.ownerResponse: Mr. Simpson, thanks for speaking with us about your review.  Our firm’s track record of excellence for almost 20 years in North Texas speaks for itself, but we certainly don’t profess to be perfect.   We’re sorry you had a negative experience and we will endeavor to be better.

reviews.text: I have now tried 5 very large cases alongside Collin, all of which were big victories on complicated cases.   Most recently, in 2020, we tried a case together in Federal Court in Little Rock, AR, which resulted in a nearly $10 million verdict on behalf of Emergency Room doctors in Arkansas.   Then, in August of this year, we went to war in Harris County against a Fortune 500 Insurance Company on behalf of Emergency Room doctors across Texas.  In that case, the result was even better, and the jury returned a verdict of $19 million.   Building upon that momentum, I asked Collin to help our trial team pick a jury in Las Vegas, NV in a case where our Emergency Room doctor clients had been grossly underpaid by the largest health insurance company in the United States.   Collin’s intuition, resourcefulness and substantial trial experience allowed us, over the course of 6 long days, to seat a jury that gave our clients a $62 million dollar verdict at the end of trial.   Whenever our firm needs co-counsel or whenever he’s available to consult with our firm’s lawyers on jury selection,  we never hesitate to call on Collin to help us deliver trial victories for our clients. – John Zavitsanos, founding partner of Ahmad, Zavitsanos, Anaipakos, Alavi & Mensing, a Chambers rated Litigation Boutique.

reviews.text: Would highly recommend Guest and Gray for your legal needs, Hunter is so great and very helpful!
I recommend MacKenzie, she’s great!

I was never given details about what was happening with my case unless I called and specifically asked. Even then, most of the time the response I got was “someone will call you back” and of course, they didn’t. When asked directly if the paperwork we needed to move forward had been filed, I was told that it had been, and that it would take up to 2 weeks to hear back. 2 weeks later, I find out it had never actually been filed and the process hadn’t even started. After nearly a month and a half of the worst communication I’ve ever experienced, and absolutely NOTHING getting done with my case, I asked for my retainer back and found a new lawyer. I will never return here.

reviews.text: I paid money to Elizabeth Alvarez when she was working at her own firm to file green card applications (K1 and K2 visa adjustments) for my wife and daughter.  We finished and signed all the documents on February 7, 2018 and after one year, never received a receipt from the government that it was accepted, and everything was in order.  Essentially, she and Jessica Burr her paralegal (1) sent the first submission to the wrong address, (2) sent the second submission to the right address, but it was rejected because either the wrong form was used, or the information was inconsistent, (3) she refiled in late August, but sent it to the wrong address again and sent it with incomplete documentation.  For example, she included the wrong birth certificate for my wife and the paperwork for my step-daughter was missing.  Then she encouraged me to wait and not to refile again because the government was just slow and if we refiled, we would lose our place in line.  (4) Finally, I asked for my money back and she agreed.  She told me that the check was in the mail, but I never received it.   When my new attorney filed the submissions, I received receipts that they were received and accepted in just over two weeks.
reviews.ownerResponse:

Thank you for sharing your feedback and we apologize for your negative experience. We are committed to providing exceptional service to our clients. Unfortunately, since your username prohibits us from personally identifying you, we cannot speak directly to your case. However, please rest assured some consultations take various times depending on the complexity of the legal issue. If you felt the consultation did not answer all your questions or legal concerns, we would have hoped that you could have simply asked for any clarifications and communicated your concerns at the time. In fact, we do not recall any time that we have had any uncomfortable consultations in the history of our existence.
Addressing our attitude and “raising our voices”, we emphatically deny your version of these events. We respect and welcome everyone into our office. My associates and I have never had an experience of the type you describe. We know immigration law is a very personal and emotional area of ​​law. We are a small firm of 4 attorneys with a supporting staff. Our office currently represents over 1,000 clients at the present time. 72% of our clients are client referrals, indicating that we provide efficient, cost-effective legal services, but we also partner with our clients to find a resolution to the legal issue with respect.

We are sorry, your version of events regarding "raising our voices" or making you feel "stupid" simply did not happen. If you wish to disclose your name, please contact our office, and we would be more than happy to refund your $95.00. We look forward to discussing your version of events. Otherwise, we hope you find a law firm that would better suit your needs.
