reviews.ownerResponse: We are so grateful to have had the opportunity to work with you and your family.  Clients like you are what make Kamuche Law Firm great!
Thank you!

reviews.text: Competent. Compassionate. Committed to YOUR Cause!

Mark O'Bryan is really an awesome attorney. He is super fast in response with any inquiry and helped me a lot. He is not only very knowledgeable but also easy to work with. I can only recommend him. Thank you Mark!!

I'll be honest I've had experience with many defense attorneys in multiple counties and Mark O'Bryan was by far the the best. I had a bad couple of years and got charges in multiple counties. Trying to coordinate 4 charges and get them taken care of together at the same time was something I never thought possible. Mark started the ball rolling and assured me it was doable. Infact his communication with the DA was excellent and he secured a plea which the other counties followed. Basically 4 in 1. I feel the results were outstanding. He's very organized and informative. Taking care to look at every possible outcome and work his hardest for me. This was back in 2015 and I took probation. Unfortunately colin county was the only one that didn't get fully taken care of Im just now aware of. The other three counties were acquitted and I was done. Thus I will be soon to need Marks help once again. 10 years have passed and I have completely turned my life around. When ready to I trust his service will once again be diligent and thorough!

It was a really smooth and easy experience working with The Law Office of Mark O' Bryan. I had a domestic violence charge and Mark was able to modify the conditions of my bond and later got the case completely dismissed. I would strongly recommend this attorney!
reviews.ownerResponse: Pleasure working with you, sir!

reviews.text: Mark is AMAZING!!! He is highly knowledgeable and communicative which was very reassuring while going through something really difficult. He takes your calls and gives you all the pieces to make an informed decision on steps to move forward. Would definitely hire him again!

Mark is definitely someone I would go to again or recommend to someone if I or they ever need an attorney. He reached out very quickly and had such amazing communication. He made sure to remind me of my court dates and times. Was very honest and upfront on what the best way to go about my case was. I was able to put trust in him knowing that he was going to be honest with me through the whole process.
reviews.ownerResponse: Thanks Shianne. It was a pleasure working with you!

reviews.text: Mr Mark O'Bryan is hands down a great defense attorney, respectful caring and thoughtful .. he cares about his all clients .. he represented me and I couldn't have been more thankful of what he did .his experience and knowledge is surpassed anyone whom has the pleasure of him representing you consider it a pleasure he's the best .... Thank you again Mr.Mark O'Bryan

Very fair when it come to his fees , Marc help me with a problem I was out of state and got it cleared up in a timely fashion, always returned your calls in a timely matter , put my like in his hands and I couldn’t be more happier with the outcome . All around great attorney great attitude and knows his way around the court house

Was a great Lawyer affordable, honest, trustworthy, and was upfront from the start, I was from out of state, never met him before put my whole life in his hands, and came out with a great outcome. You’re looking for a good lawyer, that you can believe in and put your trust in because we all know these days it’s hard to find someone trustworthy, I recommend Mark anybody He’ll be upfront with you and give you the best outcome he possibly give you
Mark was great from the get-go, super proactive, a true ally and advocate, easy to talk to, I highly recommend him!

I recently was in need of some legal help. So I contacted Mark. Which turned out to be to be the best thing I could have done. He was very helpful, honest and upfront with everything. I found it easy to relax and not stress about the situation as I knew I was in good hands. Because of Mark the case was dropped. Nice n Chill dude overall. Everytime we meet up about my case it’s seems to be going smooth. Don’t know if it’s because of my case specifically or if he’s actually doing his absolute best to make my case more smooth sailing. It’s been going well for me and I believe it may be due to his part, but whatever it may be I have no complaints.

I rarely ever leave reviews on anything let alone a service as important as an attorney but Mr. Mark did an amazing job with my case and he was very up front about all my available choices and even the process after my case he continues to help me out in my road to freedom. I felt comfortable when he and I would discuss about what we needed to do and I at no point felt as if I was being taken advantage of and I felt he honestly did everything he could do for me I couldn’t have asked for a better attorney

reviews.text: Helped point us in the right direction

My wife and I were really impressed with Mark. We’ve had other defense lawyers who weren’t nearly as attentive and courteous. I really felt comfortable with him handling my case, and his results were just what we hoped for. You can tell he’s an honest and hardworking guy.
Great lawyer! I would definitely recommend him. He was very responsive and professional.

It has been a great experience working with Mark. He was always accessible and I was able to talk to him directly. He was very straightforward and took his time explaining any questions. Mark was able to explain worst case scenario and best case scenario. Obviously his ultimate goal was to get best case scenario and he reviewed the steps he was going to take. He kept me updated throughout the process. Ultimately, he was able to get my husband reinstated!
Good lawyer highly recommend
